Key?

{{English}}

``` ### Expected behaviour Anki Desktop: ![image](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/assets/364160/7fc5ac58-33b3-4871-a52b-627b1e7bf4b7) ### Actual behaviour But the CSS modifications from JS don't work on AnkiDroid: ![image](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/assets/364160/e53a1b3a-426b-43b9-b0f1-cae7f5b30dd7) ### Debug info ```text AnkiDroid Version = 2.17.5 (1c1aa94ec466f37d33fd2f75020d9f9021ac811e) Backend Version = 0.1.34-anki23.12.1 (23.12.1 1a1d4d5419c6b57ef3baf99c9d2d9cf85d36ae0a) Android Version = 13 (SDK 33) ProductFlavor = play Manufacturer = Google Model = Pixel 4a Hardware = sunfish Webview User Agent = Mozilla/5.0 (Linux; Android 13; Pixel 4a Build/TQ3A.230805.001.S1; wv) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Version/4.0 Chrome/122.0.6261.64 Mobile Safari/537.36 ACRA UUID = c023d340-ad1e-45d7-bbe3-fab43e49f220 Crash Reports Enabled = true ``` ### (Optional) Anything else you want to share? Not sure where to start with debugging this. Pretty new to JS coding, and I don't see anything obvious here that would break the script. ### Research - [X] I am reporting a bug specific to AnkiDroid (Android app) - [X] I have checked the [manual](https://ankidroid.org/docs/manual.html) and the [FAQ](https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/wiki/FAQ) and could not find a solution to my issue - [ ] (Optional) I have confirmed the issue is not resolved in the latest alpha release ([instructions](https://docs.ankidroid.org/manual.html#betaTesting))

18→import android.content.Context
19→import android.webkit.WebResourceResponse
20→import androidx.webkit.WebViewAssetLoader
21→import com.ichi2.utils.AssetHelper.guessMimeType
22→import timber.log.Timber
23→import java.io.ByteArrayInputStream
24→import java.io.File
25→import java.io.FileInputStream
26→
27→fun Context.getViewerAssetLoader(domain: String): WebViewAssetLoader {
28→    val mediaDir = CollectionHelper.getMediaDirectory(this)
29→    return WebViewAssetLoader.Builder()
30→        .setHttpAllowed(true)
31→        .setDomain(domain)
32→        .addPathHandler("/") { path: String ->
33→            if (path == "favicon.ico") {
34→                return@addPathHandler WebResourceResponse(null, null, ByteArrayInputStream(ByteArray(0)))
35→            }
36→            try {
37→                val file = File(mediaDir, path)
38→                val inputStream = FileInputStream(file)
39→                WebResourceResponse(guessMimeType(path), null, inputStream)
40→            } catch (e: Exception) {
41→                Timber.d("File not found: %s", path)
42→                null
43→            }
44→        }
45→        .build()
46→}

 48→
 49→abstract class CardViewerFragment(@LayoutRes layout: Int) : Fragment(layout) {
 50→    protected abstract val viewModel: CardViewerViewModel
 51→    protected abstract val webView: WebView
 52→
 53→    @CallSuper
 54→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 55→        setupWebView(savedInstanceState)
 56→        setupErrorListeners()
 57→    }
 58→
 59→    override fun onStart() {
 60→        super.onStart()
 61→        viewModel.setSoundPlayerEnabled(true)
 62→    }
 63→
 64→    override fun onStop() {
 65→        super.onStop()
 66→        if (!requireActivity().isChangingConfigurations) {
 67→            viewModel.setSoundPlayerEnabled(false)
 68→        }
 69→    }
 70→
 71→    private fun setupWebView(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 72→        CookieManager.getInstance().setAcceptThirdPartyCookies(webView, true)
 73→        with(webView) {
 74→            webViewClient = onCreateWebViewClient(savedInstanceState)
 75→            webChromeClient = onCreateWebChromeClient()
 76→            scrollBarStyle = View.SCROLLBARS_OUTSIDE_OVERLAY
 77→            with(settings) {
 78→                javaScriptEnabled = true
 79→                loadWithOverviewMode = true
 80→                builtInZoomControls = true
 81→                displayZoomControls = false
 82→                allowFileAccess = true
 83→                domStorageEnabled = true
 84→            }
 85→            loadDataWithBaseURL(
 86→                "http://${AnkiServer.LOCALHOST}/",
 87→                stdHtml(requireContext(), Themes.currentTheme.isNightMode),
 88→                "text/html",
 89→                null,
 90→                null
 91→            )
 92→        }
 93→        viewModel.eval
 94→            .flowWithLifecycle(lifecycle)
 95→            .onEach { eval ->
 96→                webView.evaluateJavascript(eval, null)
 97→            }
 98→            .launchIn(lifecycleScope)
 99→    }
100→
101→    private fun setupErrorListeners() {
102→        viewModel.onError
103→            .flowWithLifecycle(lifecycle)
104→            .onEach { errorMessage ->
105→                AlertDialog.Builder(requireContext())
106→                    .setTitle(R.string.vague_error)
107→                    .setMessage(errorMessage)
108→                    .show()
109→            }
110→            .launchIn(lifecycleScope)
111→
112→        viewModel.onMediaError
113→            .onEach { showMediaErrorSnackbar(it) }
114→            .launchIn(lifecycleScope)
115→
116→        viewModel.onTtsError
117→            .onEach { showSnackbar(it.localizedErrorMessage(requireContext())) }
118→            .launchIn(lifecycleScope)
119→    }
120→
121→    private fun onCreateWebViewClient(savedInstanceState: Bundle?): WebViewClient {
122→        val assetLoader = requireContext().getViewerAssetLoader(AnkiServer.LOCALHOST)
123→        return object : WebViewClient() {
124→            override fun shouldInterceptRequest(
125→                view: WebView?,
126→                request: WebResourceRequest
127→            ): WebResourceResponse? {
128→                return assetLoader.shouldInterceptRequest(request.url)
129→            }
130→
131→            override fun onPageFinished(view: WebView?, url: String?) {
132→                viewModel.onPageFinished(isAfterRecreation = savedInstanceState != null)
133→            }
134→
135→            override fun shouldOverrideUrlLoading(view: WebView, request: WebResourceRequest): Boolean {
136→                val urlString = request.url.toString()
137→                if (urlString.startsWith("playsound:")) {
138→                    viewModel.playSoundFromUrl(urlString)
139→                    return true
140→                }
141→                if (urlString.startsWith("tts-voices:")) {
142→                    TtsVoicesDialogFragment().show(childFragmentManager, null)
143→                    return true
144→                }
145→                try {
146→                    openUrl(request.url)
147→                    return true
148→                } catch (_: Exception) {
149→                    Timber.w("Could not open url")
150→                }
151→                return false
152→            }
153→
154→            override fun onReceivedError(
155→                view: WebView,
156→                request: WebResourceRequest,
157→                error: WebResourceError
158→            ) {
159→                viewModel.mediaErrorHandler.processFailure(request) { filename: String ->
160→                    showMediaErrorSnackbar(filename)
161→                }
162→            }
163→        }
164→    }
165→
166→    private fun onCreateWebChromeClient(): WebChromeClient {
167→        return object : WebChromeClient() {
168→            private lateinit var customView: View
169→
170→            // used for displaying `<video>` in fullscreen.
171→            // This implementation requires configChanges="orientation" in the manifest
172→            // to avoid destroying the View if the device is rotated
173→            override fun onShowCustomView(
174→                paramView: View,
175→                paramCustomViewCallback: CustomViewCallback?
176→            ) {
177→                customView = paramView
178→                val window = requireActivity().window
179→                (window.decorView as FrameLayout).addView(
180→                    customView,
181→                    FrameLayout.LayoutParams(
182→                        FrameLayout.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
183→                        FrameLayout.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT
184→                    )
185→                )
186→                // hide system bars
187→                with(WindowInsetsControllerCompat(window, window.decorView)) {
188→                    systemBarsBehavior = WindowInsetsControllerCompat.BEHAVIOR_SHOW_TRANSIENT_BARS_BY_SWIPE
189→                    hide(WindowInsetsCompat.Type.systemBars())
190→                }
191→            }
192→
193→            override fun onHideCustomView() {
194→                val window = requireActivity().window
195→                (window.decorView as FrameLayout).removeView(customView)
196→                // show system bars back
197→                with(WindowInsetsControllerCompat(window, window.decorView)) {
198→                    systemBarsBehavior = WindowInsetsControllerCompat.BEHAVIOR_DEFAULT
199→                    show(WindowInsetsCompat.Type.systemBars())
200→                }
201→            }
202→        }
203→    }
204→
205→    private fun showMediaErrorSnackbar(filename: String) {
206→        showSnackbar(getString(R.string.card_viewer_could_not_find_image, filename)) {
207→            setAction(R.string.help) { openUrl(Uri.parse(getString(R.string.link_faq_missing_media))) }
208→        }
209→    }
210→
211→    private fun openUrl(uri: Uri) = startActivity(Intent(Intent.ACTION_VIEW, uri))
212→}

31→ * See: https://github.com/nickersk/nickersk.github.io/issues/16430
32→ */
33→private val CROSS_ORIGIN_HEADERS = mapOf(
34→    "Access-Control-Allow-Origin" to "*"
35→)
36→
37→fun Context.getViewerAssetLoader(domain: String): WebViewAssetLoader {
38→    val mediaDir = CollectionHelper.getMediaDirectory(this)
39→    return WebViewAssetLoader.Builder()
40→        .setHttpAllowed(true)
41→        .setDomain(domain)
42→        .addPathHandler("/") { path: String ->
43→            if (path == "favicon.ico") {
44→                return@addPathHandler WebResourceResponse(null, null, ByteArrayInputStream(ByteArray(0)))
45→            }
46→            try {
47→                val file = File(mediaDir, path)
48→                val inputStream = FileInputStream(file)
49→                WebResourceResponse(
50→                    guessMimeType(path),
51→                    null,
52→                    HTTP_OK,
53→                    "OK",
54→                    CROSS_ORIGIN_HEADERS,
55→                    inputStream
56→                )
57→            } catch (e: Exception) {
58→                Timber.d("File not found: %s", path)
59→                null
60→            }
61→        }
62→        .build()
63→}
64→

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.pages
 17→
 18→import android.graphics.Bitmap
 19→import android.webkit.ValueCallback
 20→import android.webkit.WebResourceRequest
 21→import android.webkit.WebResourceResponse
 22→import android.webkit.WebView
 23→import android.webkit.WebViewClient
 24→import androidx.core.view.isVisible
 25→import com.google.android.material.color.MaterialColors
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.OnPageFinishedCallback
 27→import com.ichi2.utils.AssetHelper
 28→import com.ichi2.utils.toRGBHex
 29→import timber.log.Timber
 30→import java.io.IOException
 31→
 32→/**
 33→ * Base WebViewClient to be used on [PageFragment]
 34→ */
 35→open class PageWebViewClient : WebViewClient() {
 36→
 37→    /** Wait for the provided promise to complete before showing the WebView */
 38→    open val promiseToWaitFor: String? = null
 39→
 40→    var onPageFinishedCallback: OnPageFinishedCallback? = null
 41→
 42→    override fun shouldInterceptRequest(
 43→        view: WebView,
 44→        request: WebResourceRequest
 45→    ): WebResourceResponse? {
 46→        val path = request.url.path
 47→        if (request.method == "GET" && path?.startsWith("/backend/web") == true) {
 48→            try {
 49→                val mime = AssetHelper.guessMimeType(path)
 50→                val inputStream = view.context.assets.open(path.substring(1))
 51→                return WebResourceResponse(mime, null, inputStream)
 52→            } catch (_: IOException) {
 53→                Timber.w("%s not found", path)
 54→            }
 55→        }
 56→        return super.shouldInterceptRequest(view, request)
 57→    }
 58→
 59→    override fun onPageStarted(view: WebView?, url: String?, favicon: Bitmap?) {
 60→        super.onPageStarted(view, url, favicon)
 61→        view?.let { webView ->
 62→            val bgColor = MaterialColors.getColor(webView, android.R.attr.colorBackground).toRGBHex()
 63→            webView.evaluateAfterDOMContentLoaded(
 64→                """document.body.style.setProperty("background-color", "$bgColor", "important");
 65→                    console.log("Background color set");"""
 66→            )
 67→        }
 68→    }
 69→
 70→    override fun onPageFinished(view: WebView?, url: String?) {
 71→        super.onPageFinished(view, url)
 72→        if (view == null) return
 73→        onPageFinishedCallback?.onPageFinished(view)
 74→        if (promiseToWaitFor == null) {
 75→            /** [PageFragment.webView] is invisible by default to avoid flashes while
 76→             * the page is loaded, and can be made visible again after it finishes loading */
 77→            Timber.v("displaying WebView")
 78→            view.isVisible = true
 79→        } else {
 80→            view.evaluateJavascript("""$promiseToWaitFor.then(() => { console.log("page-fully-loaded:"); window.location.href = "page-fully-loaded:" } )""") {
 81→                Timber.v("waiting for '$promiseToWaitFor' before displaying WebView")
 82→            }
 83→        }
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    override fun shouldOverrideUrlLoading(view: WebView?, request: WebResourceRequest?): Boolean {
 87→        if (view == null || request == null) return super.shouldOverrideUrlLoading(view, request)
 88→        if (request.url.toString() == "page-fully-loaded:") {
 89→            Timber.v("displaying WebView after '$promiseToWaitFor' executed")
 90→            view.isVisible = true
 91→            return true
 92→        }
 93→        return super.shouldOverrideUrlLoading(view, request)
 94→    }
 95→}
 96→
 97→fun WebView.evaluateAfterDOMContentLoaded(script: String, resultCallback: ValueCallback<String>? = null) {
 98→    evaluateJavascript(
 99→        """
100→                var codeToRun = function() { 
101→                    $script
102→                }
103→                
104→                if (document.readyState === "loading") {
105→                  document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", codeToRun);
106→                } else {
107→                  codeToRun();
108→                }
109→        """.trimIndent(),
110→        resultCallback
111→    )
112→}
113→

[thinking: The `PageWebViewClient` serves app assets from `/backend/web` path, which are internal app resources. This is different from the user's media files. The SVG issue reported is specifically about user m...]
The fix is complete. Let me provide a summary of the changes:

## Summary

**Problem:** JavaScript in AnkiDroid card templates couldn't access the `contentDocument` of `<object>` elements that load SVG files. When a user's template tried to modify the SVG's CSS via JavaScript like:

```javascript
var img_obj = document.getElementById("keyboard_obj");
var notes = img_obj.contentDocument.querySelectorAll(".note_{{English}}");
notes.forEach((note) => { note.style.fill = "#98ff98"; });
```

The `contentDocument` access was blocked due to Cross-Origin Resource Sharing (CORS) restrictions in the WebView.

**Root Cause:** The `WebResourceResponse` returned by `getViewerAssetLoader` did not include the `Access-Control-Allow-Origin` header. When the WebView loaded an SVG file via an `<object>` tag, the browser treated subsequent JavaScript access to the embedded document's DOM as a cross-origin request, which was blocked.

**Fix:** Modified `/project/AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/ViewerAssetLoader.kt` to include the `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` header in responses for media files. This allows JavaScript in the main document to access the DOM of SVG files (or other documents) loaded via `<object>` tags.

The fix uses the full `WebResourceResponse` constructor that accepts response headers:
```kotlin
WebResourceResponse(
    guessMimeType(path),
    null,
    HTTP_OK,
    "OK",
    CROSS_ORIGIN_HEADERS,
    inputStream
)
```

This change affects both:
1. `AbstractFlashcardViewer` - the main card reviewer
2. `CardViewerFragment` - the card previewer

Both use the same `getViewerAssetLoader` function, so the fix applies to all places where cards with embedded SVG files would be displayed.

16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences

18→import androidx.test.ext.junit.runners.AndroidJUnit4
19→import com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch.PreferenceItem
20→import com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch.SearchConfiguration
21→import com.ichi2.anki.RobolectricTest
22→import com.ichi2.testutils.getJavaFieldAsAccessible
23→import org.hamcrest.MatcherAssert.assertThat
24→import org.hamcrest.Matchers.equalTo
25→import org.junit.Test
26→import org.junit.runner.RunWith
27→import org.robolectric.Robolectric
28→import kotlin.test.assertNotNull
29→
30→@RunWith(AndroidJUnit4::class)
31→class SettingsSearchBarTest : RobolectricTest() {
32→
33→    @Test
34→    @Suppress("UNCHECKED_CAST")
35→    fun `All indexed XML resIDs lead to the correct fragments on getFragmentFromXmlRes`() {
36→        // TODO try mocking the activity
37→        val preferencesActivity = getPreferencesActivity()
38→        val searchConfig = SearchConfiguration(preferencesActivity)
39→        HeaderFragment.configureSearchBar(preferencesActivity, searchConfig)
40→
41→        // Use reflection to access some private fields
42→        val filesToIndexField = getJavaFieldAsAccessible(SearchConfiguration::class.java, "filesToIndex")
43→        val searchItemResIdField = getJavaFieldAsAccessible(SearchConfiguration.SearchIndexItem::class.java, "resId")
44→        val preferencesToIndexField = getJavaFieldAsAccessible(SearchConfiguration::class.java, "preferencesToIndex")
45→        val prefItemResIdField = getJavaFieldAsAccessible(PreferenceItem::class.java, "resId")
46→
47→        // Get the resIds of the files indexed with `SearchConfiguration.index`
48→        val filesToIndex = filesToIndexField.get(searchConfig) as ArrayList<SearchConfiguration.SearchIndexItem>
49→        val filesResIds = filesToIndex.map {
50→            searchItemResIdField.get(it)
51→        }
52→
53→        // Get the resIds of preferences indexed with `SearchConfiguration.indexItem`
54→        val preferencesToIndex = preferencesToIndexField.get(searchConfig) as ArrayList<PreferenceItem>
55→        val prefItemsResIds = preferencesToIndex.map {
56→            prefItemResIdField.get(it)
57→        }
58→
59→        // Join both lists
60→        val allResIds = filesResIds.plus(prefItemsResIds)
61→            .distinct() as List<Int>
62→
63→        // Check if all indexed XML resIDs lead to the correct fragments on getFragmentFromXmlRes
64→        for (resId in allResIds) {
65→            val fragment = Preferences.getFragmentFromXmlRes(resId)
66→
67→            assertNotNull(fragment)
68→            assertThat(
69→                "${targetContext.resources.getResourceName(resId)} should match the preferenceResource of ${fragment::class.simpleName}",
70→                fragment.preferenceResource,
71→                equalTo(resId)
72→            )
73→        }
74→    }
75→
76→    private fun getPreferencesActivity(): Preferences {
77→        return Robolectric.buildActivity(Preferences::class.java)
78→            .create().start().resume().get()
79→    }
80→}
81→

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.preferences
 17→
 18→import android.os.Bundle
 19→import android.view.View
 20→import android.view.ViewGroup
 21→import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
 22→import androidx.preference.Preference
 23→import androidx.preference.PreferenceFragmentCompat
 24→import com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch.SearchConfiguration
 25→import com.bytehamster.lib.preferencesearch.SearchPreference
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.BuildConfig
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 29→import com.ichi2.compat.CompatHelper
 30→import com.ichi2.preferences.HeaderPreference
 31→import com.ichi2.utils.AdaptionUtil
 32→
 33→class HeaderFragment : PreferenceFragmentCompat() {
 34→    private var selectedHeaderPreference: HeaderPreference? = null
 35→    private var selectedHeaderPreferenceKey: String = DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER
 36→    override fun onCreatePreferences(savedInstanceState: Bundle?, rootKey: String?) {
 37→        setPreferencesFromResource(R.xml.preference_headers, rootKey)
 38→
 39→        selectedHeaderPreferenceKey = savedInstanceState?.getString(KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF) ?: DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER
 40→
 41→        highlightHeaderPreference(requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(selectedHeaderPreferenceKey))
 42→
 43→        requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(R.string.pref_backup_limits_screen_key)
 44→            .title = CollectionManager.TR.preferencesBackups()
 45→
 46→        requirePreference<Preference>(R.string.pref_advanced_screen_key).apply {
 47→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
 48→                isVisible = false
 49→            }
 50→        }
 51→
 52→        if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(requireContext())) {
 53→            setDevOptionsVisibility(true)
 54→        }
 55→
 56→        configureSearchBar(
 57→            requireActivity() as AppCompatActivity,
 58→            requirePreference<SearchPreference>(R.string.search_preference_key).searchConfiguration
 59→        )
 60→    }
 61→
 62→    private fun highlightHeaderPreference(headerPreference: HeaderPreference) {
 63→        if (!(activity as Preferences).hasLateralNavigation()) {
 64→            return
 65→        }
 66→        selectedHeaderPreference?.setHighlighted(false)
 67→        // highlight the newly selected header
 68→        selectedHeaderPreference = headerPreference.apply {
 69→            setHighlighted(true)
 70→            selectedHeaderPreferenceKey = this.key
 71→        }
 72→    }
 73→
 74→    override fun onPreferenceTreeClick(preference: Preference): Boolean {
 75→        highlightHeaderPreference(preference as HeaderPreference)
 76→        return super.onPreferenceTreeClick(preference)
 77→    }
 78→
 79→    override fun onSaveInstanceState(outState: Bundle) {
 80→        super.onSaveInstanceState(outState)
 81→        outState.putString(KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF, selectedHeaderPreferenceKey)
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    override fun onViewStateRestored(savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 85→        super.onViewStateRestored(savedInstanceState)
 86→        highlightHeaderPreference(requirePreference<HeaderPreference>(selectedHeaderPreferenceKey))
 87→    }
 88→
 89→    override fun onStart() {
 90→        super.onStart()
 91→        requireActivity().setTitle(R.string.settings)
 92→    }
 93→
 94→    override fun onViewCreated(view: View, savedInstanceState: Bundle?) {
 95→        super.onViewCreated(view, savedInstanceState)
 96→        // use the same fragment container to search in case there is a navigation container
 97→        requirePreference<SearchPreference>(R.string.search_preference_key)
 98→            .searchConfiguration
 99→            .setFragmentContainerViewId((view.parent as? ViewGroup)?.id ?: R.id.settings_container)
100→    }
101→
102→    fun setDevOptionsVisibility(isVisible: Boolean) {
103→        requirePreference<Preference>(R.string.pref_dev_options_screen_key).isVisible = isVisible
104→    }
105→
106→    companion object {
107→        private const val KEY_SELECTED_HEADER_PREF = "selected_header_pref"
108→        private const val DEFAULT_SELECTED_HEADER = "generalScreen"
109→
110→        fun configureSearchBar(activity: AppCompatActivity, searchConfiguration: SearchConfiguration) {
111→            with(searchConfiguration) {
112→                setActivity(activity)
113→                setBreadcrumbsEnabled(true)
114→                setFuzzySearchEnabled(false)
115→                setHistoryEnabled(true)
116→
117→                index(R.xml.preferences_general)
118→                index(R.xml.preferences_reviewing)
119→                index(R.xml.preferences_sync)
120→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_sync_server)
121→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_sync)
122→                index(R.xml.preferences_notifications)
123→                index(R.xml.preferences_appearance)
124→                index(R.xml.preferences_custom_buttons)
125→                    .addBreadcrumb(R.string.pref_cat_appearance)
126→                index(R.xml.preferences_controls)
127→                index(R.xml.preferences_accessibility)
128→            }
129→
130→            // Some preferences and categories are only shown conditionally,
131→            // so they should be searchable based on the same conditions
132→
133→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
134→            if (DevOptionsFragment.isEnabled(activity)) {
135→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_dev_options)
136→                /** From [DevOptionsFragment.initSubscreen] */
137→                if (BuildConfig.DEBUG) {
138→                    searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.dev_options_enabled_by_user_key))
139→                }
140→            }
141→
142→            /** From [HeaderFragment.onCreatePreferences] */
143→            if (!AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
144→                searchConfiguration.index(R.xml.preferences_advanced)
145→            }
146→
147→            /** From [NotificationsSettingsFragment.initSubscreen] */
148→            if (AdaptionUtil.isXiaomiRestrictedLearningDevice) {
149→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_vibrate_key))
150→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.pref_notifications_blink_key))
151→            }
152→
153→            /** From [AdvancedSettingsFragment.removeUnnecessaryAdvancedPrefs] */
154→            if (!CompatHelper.hasScrollKeys()) {
155→                searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.double_scrolling_gap_key))
156→            }
157→
158→            searchConfiguration.ignorePreference(activity.getString(R.string.user_actions_controls_category_key))
159→        }
160→    }
161→}
162→

[thinking: The fix is complete and verified:

1. **The Bug**: The `preferences_backup_limits.xml` file was NOT being indexed in the search configuration in `HeaderFragment.kt`, which is why searching for "back" ...]
The bug has been fixed. Here's a summary of what I found and fixed:

## Problem
The "Backups" settings and its sub-options were not appearing in the Settings search results because the `preferences_backup_limits.xml` file was not indexed in the search configuration.

## Root Cause
In `HeaderFragment.kt`, the `configureSearchBar` method was indexing all other preference XML files for search (`preferences_general`, `preferences_reviewing`, `preferences_sync`, `preferences_notifications`, `preferences_appearance`, `preferences_controls`, `preferences_accessibility`, etc.), but `preferences_backup_limits.xml` was missing from the list.

## Fix
Added `index(R.xml.preferences_backup_limits)` to the `configureSearchBar` method in `HeaderFragment.kt` at line 128.

The mapping in `Preferences.getFragmentFromXmlRes()` was already correctly set up (line 216), so clicking on backup-related search results will properly navigate to the `BackupLimitsSettingsFragment`.

After this fix, searching for "back" in Settings will now show:
- "Backups" header
- "Minutes between automatic backups" option  
- "Daily backups to keep" option
- "Weekly backups to keep" option
- "Monthly backups to keep" option

Group commands by categories
Currently we have 39 possible commands in the control preferences (if I counted them right), which is a big number. 

Besides searching, to find a command more easily, I suggest grouping them in some categories, like:

- Answer buttons
    - Show answer
    - Answer button 1
    - Answer button 2
    - ...
- Flags
    - red
    - blue
    - orange
    - ...
- Whiteboard
    - ...
- Current card/note
    - suspend
    - delete
    - bury
    - ...
- Navigation
    - Page up
    - Page down
    - Abort
    - ...
- Misc
    - whatever couldn't be put in any other categories

 17→package com.ichi2.preferences
 18→
 19→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 20→import android.content.Context
 21→import android.util.AttributeSet
 22→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog
 23→import androidx.preference.ListPreference
 24→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.MaterialDialog
 25→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.customview.customView
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.UIUtils
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.GestureProcessor
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.CardSideSelectionDialog
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils.onGestureChanged
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.KeySelectionDialogUtils
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.sharedPrefs
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 37→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromGesture
 38→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 39→import com.ichi2.ui.KeyPicker
 40→import com.ichi2.utils.*
 41→import java.util.*
 42→
 43→/**
 44→ * A preference which allows mapping of inputs to actions (example: keys -> commands)
 45→ *
 46→ * This is implemented as a List, the elements allow the user to either add, or
 47→ * remove previously mapped keys
 48→ *
 49→ * Future:
 50→ * * Allow mapping gestures here
 51→ * * Allow maps other than the reviewer
 52→ */
 53→class ControlPreference : ListPreference {
 54→    @Suppress("unused")
 55→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int, defStyleRes: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr, defStyleRes)
 56→
 57→    @Suppress("unused")
 58→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr)
 59→
 60→    @Suppress("unused")
 61→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?) : super(context, attrs)
 62→
 63→    @Suppress("unused")
 64→    constructor(context: Context) : super(context)
 65→
 66→    fun refreshEntries() {
 67→        val entryTitles: MutableList<CharSequence> = ArrayList()
 68→        val entryIndices: MutableList<Int> = ArrayList()
 69→        // negative indices are "add"
 70→        entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_key))
 71→        entryIndices.add(ADD_KEY_INDEX)
 72→        // Put "Add gesture" option if gestures are enabled
 73→        if (context.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(GestureProcessor.PREF_KEY, false)) {
 74→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_gesture))
 75→            entryIndices.add(ADD_GESTURE_INDEX)
 76→        }
 77→        // 0 and above are "delete" actions for already mapped preferences
 78→        for ((i, binding) in MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value).withIndex()) {
 79→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_remove_binding, binding.toDisplayString(context)))
 80→            entryIndices.add(i)
 81→        }
 82→        entries = entryTitles.toTypedArray()
 83→        entryValues = entryIndices.map { it.toString() }.toTypedArray()
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    override fun onClick() {
 87→        refreshEntries()
 88→        super.onClick()
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    /** The summary that appears on the preference */
 92→    override fun getSummary(): CharSequence = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
 93→        .joinToString(", ") { it.toDisplayString(context) }
 94→
 95→    /** Called when an element is selected in the ListView */
 96→    @SuppressLint("CheckResult")
 97→    override fun callChangeListener(newValue: Any?): Boolean {
 98→        when (val index: Int = (newValue as String).toInt()) {
 99→            ADD_GESTURE_INDEX -> {
100→                val actionName = title
101→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
102→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
103→
104→                    val gesturePicker = GestureSelectionDialogUtils.getGesturePicker(context)
105→
106→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) { materialDialog ->
107→                        val gesture = gesturePicker.getGesture() ?: return@positiveButton
108→                        val mappableBinding = fromGesture(gesture)
109→                        if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
110→                            showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_gesture), materialDialog)
111→                        } else {
112→                            addBinding(mappableBinding)
113→                            dismiss()
114→                        }
115→                    }
116→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
117→                    customView(view = gesturePicker)
118→
119→                    gesturePicker.onGestureChanged { gesture ->
120→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(fromGesture(gesture))
121→                    }
122→
123→                    noAutoDismiss()
124→                }
125→            }
126→            ADD_KEY_INDEX -> {
127→                val actionName = title
128→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
129→                    val keyPicker: KeyPicker = KeyPicker.inflate(context)
130→                    customView(view = keyPicker.rootLayout)
131→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
132→
133→                    // When the user presses a key
134→                    keyPicker.setBindingChangedListener { binding ->
135→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(CardSide.BOTH)))
136→                    }
137→
138→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) {
139→                        val binding = keyPicker.getBinding() ?: return@positiveButton
140→                        // Use CardSide.BOTH as placeholder just to check if binding exists
141→                        CardSideSelectionDialog.displayInstance(context) { side ->
142→                            val mappableBinding = MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
143→                            if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
144→                                showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_key), it)
145→                            } else {
146→                                addBinding(mappableBinding)
147→                                dismiss()
148→                            }
149→                        }
150→                    }
151→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
152→
153→                    keyPicker.setKeycodeValidation(KeySelectionDialogUtils.disallowModifierKeyCodes())
154→                    noAutoDismiss()
155→                }
156→            }
157→            else -> {
158→                val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
159→                bindings.removeAt(index)
160→                value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
161→            }
162→        }
163→        // don't persist the value
164→        return false
165→    }
166→
167→    /**
168→     * Return if another command uses
169→     */
170→    private fun bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(binding: MappableBinding): Boolean {
171→        return getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding) != null
172→    }
173→
174→    /** Displays a warning to the user if the provided binding couldn't be used */
175→    private fun showToastIfBindingIsUsed(binding: MappableBinding) {
176→        val bindingCommand = getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)
177→            ?: return
178→
179→        val commandName = context.getString(bindingCommand.resourceId)
180→        val text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName)
181→        UIUtils.showThemedToast(context, text, true)
182→    }
183→
184→    /** @return command where the binding is mapped excluding the current command */
185→    private fun getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding: MappableBinding): ViewerCommand? {
186→        return MappableBinding.allMappings(context.sharedPrefs())
187→            // filter to the commands which have a binding matching this one except this
188→            .firstOrNull { x -> x.second.any { cmdBinding -> cmdBinding == binding } && x.first.preferenceKey != key }?.first
189→    }
190→
191→    private fun addBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
192→        val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
193→        // by removing the binding, we ensure it's now at the start of the list
194→        bindings.remove(binding)
195→        bindings.add(0, binding)
196→        value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
197→    }
198→
199→    /**
200→     * Remove binding from all control preferences
201→     * in the parent PreferenceGroup of this [ControlPreference]
202→     */
203→    private fun clearBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
204→        val preferenceGroup = parent
205→            ?: return
206→
207→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
208→            val commandPreference = preferenceGroup.findPreference<ControlPreference>(command.preferenceKey)!!
209→            val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(commandPreference.value)
210→            if (binding in bindings) {
211→                bindings.remove(binding)
212→                commandPreference.value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
213→            }
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun showDialogToReplaceBinding(binding: MappableBinding, title: String, parentDialog: MaterialDialog) {
218→        val commandName = context.getString(getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)!!.resourceId)
219→
220→        AlertDialog.Builder(context).show {
221→            title(text = title)
222→            message(text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName))
223→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_positive_replace) {
224→                clearBinding(binding)
225→                addBinding(binding)
226→                parentDialog.dismiss()
227→            }
228→            negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel)
229→        }
230→    }
231→
232→    companion object {
233→        private const val ADD_KEY_INDEX = -2
234→        private const val ADD_GESTURE_INDEX = -1
235→    }
236→}
237→

 35→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 36→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 37→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 38→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2),

 41→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4),
 42→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 43→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 44→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 45→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 46→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 47→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 48→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 49→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 50→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 51→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 52→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 53→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 59→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 60→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 61→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 62→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 63→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 64→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 65→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 66→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 67→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 68→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 69→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 70→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 71→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 72→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note),
 73→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card);
 74→
 75→    companion object {
 76→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 77→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 78→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 79→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 80→    }
 81→
 82→    val preferenceKey: String
 83→        get() = "binding_$name"
 84→
 85→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 86→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 87→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 88→            collection.remove(element)
 89→            collection.add(0, element)
 90→            true
 91→        }
 92→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 93→    }
 94→
 95→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 96→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 97→            // do not reorder the elements
 98→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
 99→                return@BiFunction false
100→            }
101→            collection.add(element)
102→            return@BiFunction true
103→        }
104→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
105→    }
106→
107→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
108→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
109→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
110→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
111→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
112→    }
113→
114→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
115→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
116→        bindings.remove(binding)
117→        prefs.edit {
118→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
119→        }
120→    }
121→
122→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
123→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
124→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
125→            when (this) {
126→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
127→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
128→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
129→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
130→                )
131→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
132→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
133→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
134→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
135→                )
136→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
137→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
138→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
139→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
140→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
141→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
142→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
143→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
144→                )
145→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
149→                )
150→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
151→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
152→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
153→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
154→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
155→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
156→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
157→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
158→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
159→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
160→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
161→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
162→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
163→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
164→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
168→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
169→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
170→                else -> ArrayList()
171→            }
172→
173→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
174→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
175→    }
176→
177→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
178→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
182→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
183→    }
184→
185→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {

    ANSWER_BUTTONS(R.string.pref_cat_answer_buttons),

 35→/**
 36→ * Categories for grouping [ViewerCommand]s in the Controls preferences
 37→ */
 38→enum class CommandCategory(val resourceId: Int) {
 39→    ANSWER_BUTTONS(R.string.pref_cat_answer_buttons),
 40→    FLAGS(R.string.pref_cat_flags),
 41→    CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS(R.string.pref_cat_card_note_actions),
 42→    WHITEBOARD(R.string.pref_cat_whiteboard),
 43→    AUDIO(R.string.pref_cat_audio),
 44→    NAVIGATION(R.string.pref_cat_navigation)
 45→}
 46→
 47→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 48→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int, val category: CommandCategory) {
 49→    // Answer buttons
 50→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer, CommandCategory.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
 51→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1, CommandCategory.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
 52→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2, CommandCategory.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
 53→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.gesture_answer_3, CommandCategory.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
 54→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4, CommandCategory.ANSWER_BUTTONS),
 55→    // Flags
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red, CommandCategory.FLAGS),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange, CommandCategory.FLAGS),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green, CommandCategory.FLAGS),
 59→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue, CommandCategory.FLAGS),
 60→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink, CommandCategory.FLAGS),
 61→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise, CommandCategory.FLAGS),
 62→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple, CommandCategory.FLAGS),
 63→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove, CommandCategory.FLAGS),
 64→    // Card/Note actions
 65→    UNDO(R.string.undo, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 66→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 67→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 68→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 69→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 70→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 71→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 72→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 73→    TAG(R.string.add_tag, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 74→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 75→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 76→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 77→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 78→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints, CommandCategory.CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS),
 79→    // Whiteboard
 80→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard, CommandCategory.WHITEBOARD),
 81→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard, CommandCategory.WHITEBOARD),
 82→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor, CommandCategory.WHITEBOARD),
 83→    // Audio
 84→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play, CommandCategory.AUDIO),
 85→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice, CommandCategory.AUDIO),
 86→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice, CommandCategory.AUDIO),
 87→    // Navigation
 88→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up, CommandCategory.NAVIGATION),
 89→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down, CommandCategory.NAVIGATION),
 90→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning, CommandCategory.NAVIGATION),
 91→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync, CommandCategory.NAVIGATION);
 92→
 93→    companion object {
 94→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 95→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 96→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 97→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 98→    }
 99→
100→    val preferenceKey: String
101→        get() = "binding_$name"
102→
103→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
104→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
105→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
106→            collection.remove(element)
107→            collection.add(0, element)
108→            true
109→        }
110→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
111→    }
112→
113→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
114→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
115→            // do not reorder the elements
116→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
117→                return@BiFunction false
118→            }
119→            collection.add(element)
120→            return@BiFunction true
121→        }
122→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
123→    }
124→
125→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
126→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
127→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
128→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
129→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
130→    }
131→
132→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
133→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
134→        bindings.remove(binding)
135→        prefs.edit {
136→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
137→        }
138→    }
139→
140→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
141→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
142→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
143→            when (this) {
144→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
145→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
147→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
148→                )
149→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
150→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
151→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
152→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
153→                )
154→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
155→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
156→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
157→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
158→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
159→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
160→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
161→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
162→                )
163→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
164→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
165→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
166→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
167→                )
168→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
169→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
170→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
171→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
172→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
173→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
174→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
175→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
176→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
177→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
178→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
179→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
180→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
181→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
182→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
183→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
184→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
185→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
186→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
187→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
188→                else -> ArrayList()
189→            }
190→
191→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
192→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
193→    }
194→
195→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
196→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
197→    }
198→
199→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
200→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
201→    }
202→
203→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
204→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
205→    }
206→
207→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
208→        /**
209→         *
210→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
211→         */
212→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
213→    }
214→}

18→import androidx.preference.PreferenceCategory
19→import androidx.preference.PreferenceScreen
20→import com.ichi2.anki.R
21→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.CommandCategory
22→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
23→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
24→import com.ichi2.preferences.ControlPreference
25→
26→class ControlsSettingsFragment : SettingsFragment() {
27→    override val preferenceResource: Int
28→        get() = R.xml.preferences_controls
29→    override val analyticsScreenNameConstant: String
30→        get() = "prefs.controls"
31→
32→    override fun initSubscreen() {
33→        addAllControlPreferencesToScreen(preferenceScreen)
34→    }
35→
36→    /** Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to the [PreferenceScreen], grouped by [CommandCategory] */
37→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToScreen(screen: PreferenceScreen) {
38→        // Group commands by category
39→        val commandsByCategory = ViewerCommand.entries.groupBy { it.category }
40→
41→        // Create a PreferenceCategory for each CommandCategory and add the commands
42→        for (category in CommandCategory.entries) {
43→            val commands = commandsByCategory[category] ?: continue
44→
45→            val preferenceCategory = PreferenceCategory(screen.context).apply {
46→                setTitle(category.resourceId)
47→                key = "controls_category_${category.name.lowercase()}"
48→            }
49→            screen.addPreference(preferenceCategory)
50→
51→            for (command in commands) {
52→                val preference = ControlPreference(screen.context).apply {
53→                    setTitle(command.resourceId)
54→                    key = command.preferenceKey
55→                    setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
56→                }
57→                preferenceCategory.addPreference(preference)
58→            }
59→        }
60→    }
61→
62→    /** Attaches all possible [ControlPreference] elements to a given [PreferenceCategory] */
63→    fun addAllControlPreferencesToCategory(category: PreferenceCategory) {
64→        for (command in ViewerCommand.entries) {
65→            val preference = ControlPreference(category.context).apply {
66→                setTitle(command.resourceId)
67→                key = command.preferenceKey
68→                setDefaultValue(command.defaultValue.toPreferenceString())
69→            }
70→            category.addPreference(preference)
71→        }
72→    }
73→}
74→

[thinking: All lint checks pass. Let me provide a summary of the changes made....]
All changes have been implemented successfully. Here's a summary of what was done:

## Summary of Changes

### 1. **Added `CommandCategory` enum** (`ViewerCommand.kt`)
Created a new enum to define the categories for grouping commands:
- `ANSWER_BUTTONS` - Answer buttons (Show answer, Answer button 1-4)
- `FLAGS` - Flags (Red, Orange, Green, Blue, Pink, Turquoise, Purple, Remove flag)
- `CARD_NOTE_ACTIONS` - Card/Note actions (Undo, Edit, Mark, Bury, Suspend, Delete, Tag, etc.)
- `WHITEBOARD` - Whiteboard controls
- `AUDIO` - Audio controls (Play media, Record voice, Replay voice)
- `NAVIGATION` - Navigation (Page up, Page down, Exit, Abort and sync)

### 2. **Modified `ViewerCommand` enum** (`ViewerCommand.kt`)
- Added a `category` property to each command
- Reorganized the enum entries to be grouped by category with comments

### 3. **Updated `ControlsSettingsFragment`** (`ControlsSettingsFragment.kt`)
- Modified `initSubscreen()` to create preference categories dynamically
- Added new method `addAllControlPreferencesToScreen()` that:
  - Groups commands by category
  - Creates a `PreferenceCategory` for each `CommandCategory`
  - Adds the appropriate `ControlPreference` items to each category

### 4. **Updated search index in `Preferences.kt`**
- Updated the breadcrumb to use the category name instead of the generic "Command mapping" label

### 5. **Added string resources** (`10-preferences.xml`)
- `pref_cat_answer_buttons` - "Answer buttons"
- `pref_cat_flags` - "Flags"
- `pref_cat_card_note_actions` - "Card / Note actions"
- `pref_cat_audio` - "Audio"
- `pref_cat_navigation` - "Navigation"

### 6. **Updated XML layout** (`preferences_controls.xml`)
- Removed the static `PreferenceCategory` as categories are now created dynamically

### 7. **Updated test** (`ViewerCommandTest.kt`)
- Modified the test to check for the presence of all preference keys (as a set) rather than checking the exact order, since the order changed due to category grouping

The commands are now organized into 6 logical categories with 37 total commands, making it much easier for users to find and configure the commands they need.

Add `Toggle auto advance` control/shortcut
**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**

Sometimes during review you need to pause Auto Advance, unlike Anki desktop which I only click on shift+A to pause/resume the feature, on Ankidroid you need to exit the review session and toggle it, which is not practical at all.

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A button to switch Auto Advance like the Enable/Disable whiteboard feature during review.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
x
**Additional context**
x

Let me look at the key auto-advance files and also find how the whiteboard toggle is implemented:

1→/*
 2→ *  Copyright (c) 2024 Brayan Oliveira <brayandso.dev@gmail.com>
 3→ *
 4→ *  This program is free software; you can redistribute it and/or modify it under
 5→ *  the terms of the GNU General Public License as published by the Free Software
 6→ *  Foundation; either version 3 of the License, or (at your option) any later
 7→ *  version.
 8→ *
 9→ *  This program is distributed in the hope that it will be useful, but WITHOUT ANY
10→ *  WARRANTY; without even the implied warranty of MERCHANTABILITY or FITNESS FOR A
11→ *  PARTICULAR PURPOSE. See the GNU General Public License for more details.
12→ *
13→ *  You should have received a copy of the GNU General Public License along with
14→ *  this program.  If not, see <http://www.gnu.org/licenses/>.
15→ */
16→package com.ichi2.anki.ui.windows.reviewer.autoadvance
17→
18→import com.ichi2.anki.CollectionManager.TR
19→import com.ichi2.anki.asyncIO
20→import com.ichi2.anki.launchCatchingIO
21→import com.ichi2.anki.ui.windows.reviewer.ReviewerViewModel
22→import com.ichi2.libanki.Card
23→import kotlinx.coroutines.Job
24→import kotlinx.coroutines.delay
25→
26→/**
27→ * Implementation of the `Auto Advance` deck options
28→ *
29→ * A timer (in seconds) can be set to automatically trigger an action after it runs out,
30→ * either in the question side ([QuestionAction]) or in the answer side ([AnswerAction]).
31→ *
32→ * If a timer is set to 0, the corresponding action is not triggered.
33→ *
34→ * @see AutoAdvanceSettings
35→ */
36→class AutoAdvance(val viewModel: ReviewerViewModel) {
37→    private var questionActionJob: Job? = null
38→    private var answerActionJob: Job? = null
39→
40→    private var settings = viewModel.asyncIO {
41→        val card = viewModel.currentCard.await()
42→        AutoAdvanceSettings.createInstance(card.currentDeckId().did)
43→    }
44→
45→    private suspend fun durationToShowQuestionFor() = settings.await().durationToShowQuestionFor
46→    private suspend fun durationToShowAnswerFor() = settings.await().durationToShowAnswerFor
47→    private suspend fun questionAction() = settings.await().questionAction
48→    private suspend fun answerAction() = settings.await().answerAction
49→    suspend fun shouldWaitForAudio() = settings.await().waitForAudio
50→
51→    fun cancelQuestionAndAnswerActionJobs() {
52→        questionActionJob?.cancel()
53→        answerActionJob?.cancel()
54→    }
55→
56→    fun onCardChange(card: Card) {
57→        cancelQuestionAndAnswerActionJobs()
58→        settings = viewModel.asyncIO {
59→            AutoAdvanceSettings.createInstance(card.currentDeckId().did)
60→        }
61→    }
62→
63→    suspend fun onShowQuestion() {
64→        answerActionJob?.cancel()
65→        if (!durationToShowQuestionFor().isPositive()) return
66→
67→        questionActionJob = viewModel.launchCatchingIO {
68→            delay(durationToShowQuestionFor())
69→            when (questionAction()) {
70→                QuestionAction.SHOW_ANSWER -> viewModel.showAnswer()
71→                QuestionAction.SHOW_REMINDER -> showReminder(TR.studyingQuestionTimeElapsed())
72→            }
73→        }
74→    }
75→
76→    suspend fun onShowAnswer() {
77→        questionActionJob?.cancel()
78→        if (!durationToShowAnswerFor().isPositive()) return
79→
80→        answerActionJob = viewModel.launchCatchingIO {
81→            delay(durationToShowAnswerFor())
82→            when (answerAction()) {
83→                AnswerAction.BURY_CARD -> viewModel.buryCard()
84→                AnswerAction.ANSWER_AGAIN -> viewModel.answerAgain()
85→                AnswerAction.ANSWER_HARD -> viewModel.answerHard()
86→                AnswerAction.ANSWER_GOOD -> viewModel.answerGood()
87→                AnswerAction.SHOW_REMINDER -> showReminder(TR.studyingAnswerTimeElapsed())
88→            }
89→        }
90→    }
91→
92→    private fun showReminder(message: String) {
93→        viewModel.launchCatchingIO {
94→            viewModel.actionFeedbackFlow.emit(message)
95→        }
96→    }
97→}
98→

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer
 17→
 18→import android.content.SharedPreferences
 19→import android.view.KeyEvent
 20→import androidx.core.content.edit
 21→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.keyCode
 23→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.unicode
 24→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.ctrl
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.shift
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromPreference
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Screen
 32→import java.util.Arrays
 33→import java.util.function.BiFunction
 34→import java.util.stream.Collectors
 35→
 36→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 37→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 38→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.answer_again),
 40→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.answer_hard),
 41→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.answer_good),
 42→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.answer_easy),
 43→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 44→    REDO(R.string.redo),
 45→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 46→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 47→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 48→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 49→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 50→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 51→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 52→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 53→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 59→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 60→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 61→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 62→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 63→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 64→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 65→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 66→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 67→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 68→    SAVE_VOICE(R.string.save_voice),
 69→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 70→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 71→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 72→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 73→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 74→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 75→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note),
 76→
 77→    // TODO: CollectionManager.TR.actionsSetDueDate()
 78→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card),
 79→    USER_ACTION_1(R.string.user_action_1),
 80→    USER_ACTION_2(R.string.user_action_2),
 81→    USER_ACTION_3(R.string.user_action_3),
 82→    USER_ACTION_4(R.string.user_action_4),
 83→    USER_ACTION_5(R.string.user_action_5),
 84→    USER_ACTION_6(R.string.user_action_6),
 85→    USER_ACTION_7(R.string.user_action_7),
 86→    USER_ACTION_8(R.string.user_action_8),
 87→    USER_ACTION_9(R.string.user_action_9)
 88→    ;
 89→
 90→    companion object {
 91→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 92→            get() = Arrays.stream(entries.toTypedArray())
 93→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 94→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 95→
 96→        fun fromPreferenceKey(key: String) = entries.first { it.preferenceKey == key }
 97→    }
 98→
 99→    val preferenceKey: String
100→        get() = "binding_$name"
101→
102→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
103→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
104→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
105→            collection.remove(element)
106→            collection.add(0, element)
107→            true
108→        }
109→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
110→    }
111→
112→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
113→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
114→            // do not reorder the elements
115→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
116→                return@BiFunction false
117→            }
118→            collection.add(element)
119→            return@BiFunction true
120→        }
121→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
122→    }
123→
124→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
125→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
126→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
127→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
128→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
129→    }
130→
131→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
132→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
133→        bindings.remove(binding)
134→        prefs.edit {
135→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
136→        }
137→    }
138→
139→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
140→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
141→        get() {
142→            // all of the default commands are currently for the Reviewer
143→            fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, modifierKeys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()) =
144→                keyCode(keycode, Screen.Reviewer(side), modifierKeys)
145→            fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide) = unicode(c, Screen.Reviewer(side))
146→            return when (this) {
147→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> listOf(
148→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
149→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
150→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
151→                )
152→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> listOf(
153→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
154→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
155→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
156→                )
157→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> listOf(
158→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
159→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
160→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
161→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
162→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
163→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
164→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
165→                )
166→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> listOf(
167→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
168→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
169→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
170→                )
171→                EDIT -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
172→                MARK -> listOf(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
173→                BURY_CARD -> listOf(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
174→                BURY_NOTE -> listOf(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
175→                SUSPEND_CARD -> listOf(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
176→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> listOf(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
177→                PLAY_MEDIA -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
178→                REPLAY_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
179→                RECORD_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
180→                SAVE_VOICE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_S, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
181→                UNDO -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
182→                REDO -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH, ModifierKeys(shift = true, ctrl = true, alt = false)))
183→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
184→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
185→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
186→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
187→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
188→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
189→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
190→                SHOW_HINT -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
191→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
192→                ADD_NOTE -> listOf(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
193→                else -> emptyList()
194→            }
195→        }
196→
197→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, screen: Screen, keys: ModifierKeys = ModifierKeys.none()): MappableBinding {
198→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), screen)
199→    }
200→
201→    private fun unicode(c: Char, screen: Screen): MappableBinding {
202→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), screen)
203→    }
204→
205→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
206→        /**
207→         * @return whether the command was executed
208→         */
209→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
210→    }
211→}
212→

17→
18→    <!-- 11-arrays.xml used to contain arrays. This caused problems when changing the ordering.
19→    Now arrays are defined in constants.xml, and the strings are here -->
20→
21→    <!-- error_reporting_choice_labels -->
22→    <string name="error_reporting_choice_always_report">Always report</string>
23→    <string name="error_reporting_choice_never_report">Never report</string>
24→    <string name="error_reporting_choice_ask_user">Ask me</string>
25→
26→    <!-- leech_action_labels -->
27→    <!-- 01-core:menu_suspend_card -->

 129→open class Reviewer :
 130→    AbstractFlashcardViewer(),
