 601→    private fun openOrToggleMicToolbar() {
 602→        if (!canRecordAudio(this)) {
 603→            ActivityCompat.requestPermissions(
 604→                this,
 605→                arrayOf(Manifest.permission.RECORD_AUDIO),
 606→                REQUEST_AUDIO_PERMISSION
 607→            )
 608→        } else {
 609→            toggleMicToolBar()
 610→        }
 611→    }
 612→
 613→    private fun toggleMicToolBar() {
 614→        audioView?.let {
 615→            it.visibility = if (it.visibility != View.VISIBLE) View.VISIBLE else View.GONE
 616→            return
 617→        }
 618→        // Record mic tool bar does not exist yet
 619→        tempAudioPath = generateTempAudioFile(this)
 620→        if (tempAudioPath == null) {
 621→            return
 622→        }
 623→        audioView = createRecorderInstance(
 624→            this,
 625→            R.drawable.ic_play_arrow_white_24dp,
 626→            R.drawable.ic_pause_white_24dp,
 627→            R.drawable.ic_stop_white_24dp,
 628→            R.drawable.ic_rec,
 629→            R.drawable.ic_rec_stop,
 630→            tempAudioPath!!
 631→        )
 632→        if (audioView == null) {
 633→            tempAudioPath = null
 634→            return
 635→        }
 636→        val lp2 = FrameLayout.LayoutParams(
 637→            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT,
 638→            ViewGroup.LayoutParams.MATCH_PARENT
 639→        )
 640→        audioView!!.layoutParams = lp2
 641→        val micToolBarLayer = findViewById<LinearLayout>(R.id.mic_tool_bar_layer)
 642→        micToolBarLayer.addView(audioView)
 643→    }

 697→            Intent(this, CardInfo::class.java).apply {
 698→                putExtra("cardId", currentCard!!.id)

 704→        intent.putExtra(FINISH_ANIMATION_EXTRA, getInverseTransition(animation) as Parcelable)
 705→        startActivityWithAnimation(intent, animation)
 706→    }

 708→    // Related to https://github.com/ankidroid/Anki-Android/pull/11061#issuecomment-1107868455
 709→    @NeedsTest("Order of operations needs Testing around Menu (Overflow) Icons and their colors.")
 710→    override fun onCreateOptionsMenu(menu: Menu): Boolean {
 711→        Timber.d("onCreateOptionsMenu()")
 712→        // NOTE: This is called every time a new question is shown via invalidate options menu
 713→        menuInflater.inflate(R.menu.reviewer, menu)
 714→        displayIcons(menu)
 715→        mActionButtons.setCustomButtonsStatus(menu)
 716→        var alpha = if (super.controlBlocked !== ReviewerUi.ControlBlock.SLOW) Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT else Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 717→        val markCardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_mark_card)
 718→        if (currentCard != null && isMarked(currentCard!!.note())) {
 719→            markCardIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_unmark_note).setIcon(R.drawable.ic_star_white)
 720→        } else {
 721→            markCardIcon.setTitle(R.string.menu_mark_note).setIcon(R.drawable.ic_star_border_white)
 722→        }
 723→        markCardIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 724→
 725→        val flagIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_flag)
 726→        if (flagIcon != null) {
 727→            if (currentCard != null) {
 728→                when (currentCard!!.userFlag()) {
 729→                    1 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_red)
 730→                    2 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_orange)
 731→                    3 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_green)
 732→                    4 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_blue)
 733→                    5 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_pink)
 734→                    6 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_turquoise)
 735→                    7 -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_purple)
 736→                    else -> flagIcon.setIcon(R.drawable.ic_flag_transparent)
 737→                }
 738→            }
 739→            flagIcon.iconAlpha = alpha
 740→        }
 741→
 742→        // Undo button
 743→        @DrawableRes val undoIconId: Int
 744→        val undoEnabled: Boolean
 745→        val whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes = mShowWhiteboard && whiteboard?.undoEmpty() == false
 746→        if (whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes) {
 747→            undoIconId = R.drawable.eraser
 748→            undoEnabled = true
 749→        } else {
 750→            undoIconId = R.drawable.ic_undo_white
 751→            undoEnabled = colIsOpen() && col.undoAvailable()
 752→        }
 753→        val alphaUndo = if (undoEnabled && super.controlBlocked !== ReviewerUi.ControlBlock.SLOW) Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT else Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 754→        val undoIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_undo)
 755→        undoIcon.setIcon(undoIconId)
 756→        undoIcon.setEnabled(undoEnabled).iconAlpha = alphaUndo
 757→        undoIcon.actionView!!.isEnabled = undoEnabled
 758→        if (colIsOpen()) { // Required mostly because there are tests where `col` is null
 759→            if (whiteboardIsShownAndHasStrokes) {
 760→                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.undo_action_whiteboard_last_stroke)
 761→            } else if (col.undoAvailable()) {
 762→                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.studyoptions_congrats_undo, col.undoName(resources))
 763→                //  e.g. Undo Bury, Undo Change Deck, Undo Update Note
 764→            } else {
 765→                // In this case, there is no object word for the verb, "Undo",
 766→                // so in some languages such as Japanese, which have pre/post-positional particle with the object,
 767→                // we need to use the string for just "Undo" instead of the string for "Undo %s".
 768→                undoIcon.title = resources.getString(R.string.undo)
 769→            }
 770→        }
 771→        if (undoEnabled) {
 772→            mOnboarding.onUndoButtonEnabled()
 773→        }
 774→        val toggleWhiteboardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_toggle_whiteboard)
 775→        val toggleStylusIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_toggle_stylus)
 776→        val hideWhiteboardIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_hide_whiteboard)
 777→        val changePenColorIcon = menu.findItem(R.id.action_change_whiteboard_pen_color)
 778→        // White board button
 779→        if (prefWhiteboard) {
 780→            // Configure the whiteboard related items in the action bar
 781→            toggleWhiteboardIcon.setTitle(R.string.disable_whiteboard)
 782→            // Always allow "Disable Whiteboard", even if "Enable Whiteboard" is disabled
 783→            toggleWhiteboardIcon.isVisible = true
 784→            if (!mActionButtons.status.toggleStylusIsDisabled()) {
 785→                toggleStylusIcon.isVisible = true
 786→            }
 787→            if (!mActionButtons.status.hideWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 788→                hideWhiteboardIcon.isVisible = true
 789→            }
 790→            if (!mActionButtons.status.clearWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 791→                menu.findItem(R.id.action_clear_whiteboard).isVisible = true
 792→            }
 793→            if (!mActionButtons.status.saveWhiteboardIsDisabled()) {
 794→                menu.findItem(R.id.action_save_whiteboard).isVisible = true
 795→            }
 796→            if (!mActionButtons.status.whiteboardPenColorIsDisabled()) {
 797→                changePenColorIcon.isVisible = true
 798→            }
 799→            val whiteboardIcon = ContextCompat.getDrawable(this, R.drawable.ic_gesture_white)!!.mutate()
 800→            val stylusIcon = ContextCompat.getDrawable(this, R.drawable.ic_gesture_stylus)!!.mutate()
 801→            val whiteboardColorPaletteIcon = VectorDrawableCompat.create(resources, R.drawable.ic_color_lens_white_24dp, null)!!.mutate()
 802→            if (mShowWhiteboard) {
 803→                whiteboardIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT
 804→                hideWhiteboardIcon.icon = whiteboardIcon
 805→                hideWhiteboardIcon.setTitle(R.string.hide_whiteboard)
 806→                whiteboardColorPaletteIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT
 807→                changePenColorIcon.icon = whiteboardColorPaletteIcon
 808→                if (toggleStylus) {
 809→                    toggleStylusIcon.setTitle(R.string.disable_stylus)
 810→                    stylusIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_ENABLED_LIGHT
 811→                } else {
 812→                    toggleStylusIcon.setTitle(R.string.enable_stylus)
 813→                    stylusIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 814→                }
 815→                toggleStylusIcon.icon = stylusIcon
 816→            } else {
 817→                whiteboardIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 818→                hideWhiteboardIcon.icon = whiteboardIcon
 819→                hideWhiteboardIcon.setTitle(R.string.show_whiteboard)
 820→                whiteboardColorPaletteIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 821→                stylusIcon.alpha = Themes.ALPHA_ICON_DISABLED_LIGHT
 822→                toggleStylusIcon.isEnabled = false
 823→                toggleStylusIcon.icon = stylusIcon
 824→                changePenColorIcon.isEnabled = false
 825→                changePenColorIcon.icon = whiteboardColorPaletteIcon
 826→                mColorPalette.visibility = View.GONE
 827→            }
 828→        } else {

 917→    override fun displayAnswerBottomBar() {
 918→        super.displayAnswerBottomBar()
 919→        mOnboarding.onAnswerShown()
 920→        val buttonCount: Int = try {
 921→            this.buttonCount
 922→        } catch (e: RuntimeException) {
 923→            CrashReportService.sendExceptionReport(e, "AbstractReviewer-showEaseButtons")
 924→            closeReviewer(DeckPicker.RESULT_DB_ERROR, true)
 925→            return
 926→        }
 927→
 928→        // Set correct label and background resource for each button
 929→        // Note that it's necessary to set the resource dynamically as the ease2 / ease3 buttons
 930→        // (which libanki expects ease to be 2 and 3) can either be hard, good, or easy - depending on num buttons shown
 931→        val background = getBackgroundColors(this)
 932→        val textColor = getTextColors(this)
 933→        easeButton1!!.setVisibility(View.VISIBLE)
 934→        easeButton1!!.setColor(background[0])
 935→        easeButton4!!.setColor(background[3])
 936→        when (buttonCount) {
 937→            2 -> {
 938→                // Ease 2 is "good"
 939→                easeButton2!!.setup(background[2], textColor[2], R.string.ease_button_good)
 940→                easeButton2!!.requestFocus()
 941→            }
 942→            3 -> {
 943→                // Ease 2 is good
 944→                easeButton2!!.setup(background[2], textColor[2], R.string.ease_button_good)
 945→                // Ease 3 is easy
 946→                easeButton3!!.setup(background[3], textColor[3], R.string.ease_button_easy)
 947→                easeButton2!!.requestFocus()
 948→            }
 949→            else -> {
 950→                // Ease 2 is "hard"
 951→                easeButton2!!.setup(background[1], textColor[1], R.string.ease_button_hard)
 952→                easeButton2!!.requestFocus()
 953→                // Ease 3 is good
 954→                easeButton3!!.setup(background[2], textColor[2], R.string.ease_button_good)
 955→                easeButton4!!.setVisibility(View.VISIBLE)
 956→                easeButton3!!.requestFocus()
 957→            }
 958→        }
 959→
 960→        // Show next review time
 961→        if (shouldShowNextReviewTime()) {
 962→            fun nextIvlStr(button: Int) = sched!!.nextIvlStr(this, currentCard!!, button)
 963→
 964→            easeButton1!!.nextTime = nextIvlStr(Consts.BUTTON_ONE)
 965→            easeButton2!!.nextTime = nextIvlStr(Consts.BUTTON_TWO)
 966→            if (buttonCount > 2) {

 968→            }
 969→            if (buttonCount > 3) {
 970→                easeButton4!!.nextTime = nextIvlStr(Consts.BUTTON_FOUR)

1021→    private fun updateScreenCounts() {
1022→        if (currentCard == null) return
1023→        super.updateActionBar()
1024→        val actionBar = supportActionBar
1025→        val counts = sched!!.counts(currentCard!!)
1026→        if (actionBar != null) {
1027→            if (mPrefShowETA) {
1028→                mEta = sched!!.eta(counts, false)
1029→                actionBar.subtitle = Utils.remainingTime(this, (mEta * 60).toLong())
1030→            }
1031→        }
1032→        mNewCount = SpannableString(counts.new.toString())
1033→        mLrnCount = SpannableString(counts.lrn.toString())
1034→        mRevCount = SpannableString(counts.rev.toString())
1035→        if (mPrefHideDueCount) {
1036→            mRevCount = SpannableString("???")
1037→        }
1038→        // if this code is run as a card is being answered, currentCard may be non-null but
1039→        // the queues may be empty - we can't call countIdx() in such a case
1040→        if (counts.count() != 0) {
1041→            when (sched!!.countIdx(currentCard!!)) {
1042→                Counts.Queue.NEW -> mNewCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, mNewCount!!.length, 0)
1043→                Counts.Queue.LRN -> mLrnCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, mLrnCount!!.length, 0)
1044→                Counts.Queue.REV -> mRevCount!!.setSpan(UnderlineSpan(), 0, mRevCount!!.length, 0)
1045→            }
1046→        }
1047→        mTextBarNew.text = mNewCount
1048→        mTextBarLearn.text = mLrnCount
1049→        mTextBarReview.text = mRevCount
1050→    }

1122→    override fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean {
1123→        if (isControlBlocked && which !== ViewerCommand.EXIT) {
1124→            return false
1125→        }
1126→        when (which) {
1127→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> {
1128→                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_RED)
1129→                return true
1130→            }
1131→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> {
1132→                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_ORANGE)
1133→                return true
1134→            }
1135→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> {
1136→                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_GREEN)
1137→                return true
1138→            }
1139→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> {
1140→                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_BLUE)
1141→                return true
1142→            }
1143→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> {
1144→                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_PINK)
1145→                return true
1146→            }
1147→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> {
1148→                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_TURQUOISE)
1149→                return true
1150→            }
1151→            ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> {
1152→                toggleFlag(CardMarker.FLAG_PURPLE)
1153→                return true
1154→            }
1155→            ViewerCommand.UNSET_FLAG -> {
1156→                onFlag(currentCard, CardMarker.FLAG_NONE)
1157→                return true
1158→            }
1159→            ViewerCommand.MARK -> {
1160→                onMark(currentCard)
1161→                return true
1162→            }
1163→            ViewerCommand.ADD_NOTE -> {
1164→                addNote(fromGesture)
1165→                return true
1166→            }
1167→            ViewerCommand.CARD_INFO -> {
1168→                openCardInfo(fromGesture)
1169→                return true
1170→            }
1171→            else -> return super.executeCommand(which, fromGesture)
1172→        }
1173→    }

1239→    @Suppress("deprecation") // #9332: UI Visibility -> Insets
1240→    private fun setFullScreen(a: AbstractFlashcardViewer) {
1241→        // Set appropriate flags to enable Sticky Immersive mode.
1242→        a.window.decorView.systemUiVisibility = (
1243→            View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_STABLE // | View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_HIDE_NAVIGATION // temporarily disabled due to #5245
1244→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LAYOUT_FULLSCREEN
1245→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION
1246→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_FULLSCREEN
1247→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_LOW_PROFILE
1248→                or View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_IMMERSIVE
1249→            )
1250→        // Show / hide the Action bar together with the status bar
1251→        val prefs = a.sharedPrefs()
1252→        val fullscreenMode = fromPreference(prefs)
1253→        a.window.statusBarColor = getColorFromAttr(a, android.R.attr.colorPrimary)
1254→        val decorView = a.window.decorView
1255→        decorView.setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener { flags: Int ->
1256→            val toolbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.toolbar)
1257→            val answerButtons = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.answer_options_layout)
1258→            val topbar = a.findViewById<View>(R.id.top_bar)
1259→            if (toolbar == null || topbar == null || answerButtons == null) {
1260→                return@setOnSystemUiVisibilityChangeListener
1261→            }
1262→            // Note that system bars will only be "visible" if none of the
1263→            // LOW_PROFILE, HIDE_NAVIGATION, or FULLSCREEN flags are set.
1264→            val visible = flags and View.SYSTEM_UI_FLAG_HIDE_NAVIGATION == 0
1265→            Timber.d("System UI visibility change. Visible: %b", visible)
1266→            if (visible) {
1267→                showViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1268→                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1269→                    showViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1270→                    showViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1271→                }
1272→            } else {
1273→                hideViewWithAnimation(toolbar)
1274→                if (fullscreenMode == FullScreenMode.FULLSCREEN_ALL_GONE) {
1275→                    hideViewWithAnimation(topbar)
1276→                    hideViewWithAnimation(answerButtons)
1277→                }
1278→            }
1279→        }
1280→    }

1282→    private fun showViewWithAnimation(view: View) {
1283→        view.alpha = 0.0f
1284→        view.visibility = View.VISIBLE
1285→        view.animate().alpha(TRANSPARENCY).setDuration(ANIMATION_DURATION.toLong()).setListener(null)
1286→    }
1287→
1288→    private fun hideViewWithAnimation(view: View) {
1289→        view.animate()
1290→            .alpha(0f)
1291→            .setDuration(ANIMATION_DURATION.toLong())
1292→            .setListener(object : AnimatorListenerAdapter() {
1293→                override fun onAnimationEnd(animation: Animator) {
1294→                    view.visibility = View.GONE
1295→                }
1296→            })
1297→    }

1304→    private fun createWhiteboard() {
1305→        whiteboard = createInstance(this, true, this)
1306→
1307→        // We use the pen color of the selected deck at the time the whiteboard is enabled.
1308→        // This is how all other whiteboard settings are
1309→        val whiteboardPenColor = MetaDB.getWhiteboardPenColor(this, parentDid).fromPreferences()
1310→        if (whiteboardPenColor != null) {
1311→            whiteboard!!.penColor = whiteboardPenColor
1312→        }
1313→        whiteboard!!.setOnPaintColorChangeListener(object : OnPaintColorChangeListener {
1314→            override fun onPaintColorChange(color: Int?) {
1315→                MetaDB.storeWhiteboardPenColor(this@Reviewer, parentDid, !currentTheme.isNightMode, color)
1316→            }
1317→        })
1318→        whiteboard!!.setOnTouchListener { v: View, event: MotionEvent? ->
1319→            if (event == null) return@setOnTouchListener false
1320→            // If the whiteboard is currently drawing, and triggers the system UI to show, we want to continue drawing.
1321→            if (!whiteboard!!.isCurrentlyDrawing && (
1322→                !mShowWhiteboard || (
1323→                    mPrefFullscreenReview &&
1324→                        isImmersiveSystemUiVisible(this@Reviewer)
1325→                    )
1326→                )
1327→            ) {
1328→                // Bypass whiteboard listener when it's hidden or fullscreen immersive mode is temporarily suspended
1329→                v.performClick()
1330→                return@setOnTouchListener gestureDetector!!.onTouchEvent(event)
1331→            }
1332→            whiteboard!!.handleTouchEvent(event)
1333→        }
1334→    }

1371→    /**
1372→     * Whether or not dismiss note is available for current card and specified DismissType
1373→     * @return true if there is another card of same note that could be dismissed
1374→     */
1375→    @KotlinCleanup("mCurrentCard handling")
1376→    private fun suspendNoteAvailable(): Boolean {
1377→        return if (currentCard == null || isControlBlocked) {
1378→            false
1379→        } else {
1380→            col.db.queryScalar(
1381→                "select 1 from cards where nid = ? and id != ? and queue != " + Consts.QUEUE_TYPE_SUSPENDED + " limit 1",
1382→                currentCard!!.nid,
1383→                currentCard!!.id
1384→            ) == 1
1385→        }
1386→        // whether there exists a sibling not buried.

1482→    private fun createActionViewWith(

1487→        showsSubMenu: () -> Boolean

1490→        menuItem.icon?.isAutoMirrored = true
1491→        setImageDrawable(menuItem.icon)
1492→        id = menuItem.itemId
1493→        setOnClickListener {
1494→            if (!menuItem.isEnabled) {
1495→                return@setOnClickListener
1496→            }
1497→            if (showsSubMenu()) {
1498→                PopupMenu(context, this).apply {
1499→                    inflate(subMenuRes)
1500→                    setOnMenuItemClickListener(onMenuItemSelection)
1501→                    show()
1502→                }
1503→            } else {

1505→            }
1506→        }

1604→

1612→            return true
1613→        }

1620→                return false
1621→            }

1624→            return true

 17→package com.ichi2.preferences
 18→
 19→import android.annotation.SuppressLint
 20→import android.content.Context
 21→import android.util.AttributeSet
 22→import androidx.appcompat.app.AlertDialog
 23→import androidx.preference.ListPreference
 24→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.MaterialDialog
 25→import com.afollestad.materialdialogs.customview.customView
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.UIUtils
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.GestureProcessor
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.CardSideSelectionDialog
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.GestureSelectionDialogUtils.onGestureChanged
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.dialogs.KeySelectionDialogUtils
 34→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.sharedPrefs
 35→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 36→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 37→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromGesture
 38→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 39→import com.ichi2.ui.KeyPicker
 40→import com.ichi2.utils.*
 41→import java.util.*
 42→
 43→/**
 44→ * A preference which allows mapping of inputs to actions (example: keys -> commands)
 45→ *
 46→ * This is implemented as a List, the elements allow the user to either add, or
 47→ * remove previously mapped keys
 48→ *
 49→ * Future:
 50→ * * Allow mapping gestures here
 51→ * * Allow maps other than the reviewer
 52→ */
 53→class ControlPreference : ListPreference {
 54→    @Suppress("unused")
 55→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int, defStyleRes: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr, defStyleRes)
 56→
 57→    @Suppress("unused")
 58→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?, defStyleAttr: Int) : super(context, attrs, defStyleAttr)
 59→
 60→    @Suppress("unused")
 61→    constructor(context: Context, attrs: AttributeSet?) : super(context, attrs)
 62→
 63→    @Suppress("unused")
 64→    constructor(context: Context) : super(context)
 65→
 66→    fun refreshEntries() {
 67→        val entryTitles: MutableList<CharSequence> = ArrayList()
 68→        val entryIndices: MutableList<Int> = ArrayList()
 69→        // negative indices are "add"
 70→        entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_key))
 71→        entryIndices.add(ADD_KEY_INDEX)
 72→        // Put "Add gesture" option if gestures are enabled
 73→        if (context.sharedPrefs().getBoolean(GestureProcessor.PREF_KEY, false)) {
 74→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_add_gesture))
 75→            entryIndices.add(ADD_GESTURE_INDEX)
 76→        }
 77→        // 0 and above are "delete" actions for already mapped preferences
 78→        for ((i, binding) in MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value).withIndex()) {
 79→            entryTitles.add(context.getString(R.string.binding_remove_binding, binding.toDisplayString(context)))
 80→            entryIndices.add(i)
 81→        }
 82→        entries = entryTitles.toTypedArray()
 83→        entryValues = entryIndices.map { it.toString() }.toTypedArray()
 84→    }
 85→
 86→    override fun onClick() {
 87→        refreshEntries()
 88→        super.onClick()
 89→    }
 90→
 91→    /** The summary that appears on the preference */
 92→    override fun getSummary(): CharSequence = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
 93→        .joinToString(", ") { it.toDisplayString(context) }
 94→
 95→    /** Called when an element is selected in the ListView */
 96→    @SuppressLint("CheckResult")
 97→    override fun callChangeListener(newValue: Any?): Boolean {
 98→        when (val index: Int = (newValue as String).toInt()) {
 99→            ADD_GESTURE_INDEX -> {
100→                val actionName = title
101→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
102→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
103→
104→                    val gesturePicker = GestureSelectionDialogUtils.getGesturePicker(context)
105→
106→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) { materialDialog ->
107→                        val gesture = gesturePicker.getGesture() ?: return@positiveButton
108→                        val mappableBinding = fromGesture(gesture)
109→                        if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
110→                            showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_gesture), materialDialog)
111→                        } else {
112→                            addBinding(mappableBinding)
113→                            dismiss()
114→                        }
115→                    }
116→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
117→                    customView(view = gesturePicker)
118→
119→                    gesturePicker.onGestureChanged { gesture ->
120→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(fromGesture(gesture))
121→                    }
122→
123→                    noAutoDismiss()
124→                }
125→            }
126→            ADD_KEY_INDEX -> {
127→                val actionName = title
128→                MaterialDialog(context).show {
129→                    val keyPicker: KeyPicker = KeyPicker.inflate(context)
130→                    customView(view = keyPicker.rootLayout)
131→                    title(text = actionName.toString())
132→
133→                    // When the user presses a key
134→                    keyPicker.setBindingChangedListener { binding ->
135→                        showToastIfBindingIsUsed(MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(CardSide.BOTH)))
136→                    }
137→
138→                    positiveButton(R.string.dialog_ok) {
139→                        val binding = keyPicker.getBinding() ?: return@positiveButton
140→                        // Use CardSide.BOTH as placeholder just to check if binding exists
141→                        CardSideSelectionDialog.displayInstance(context) { side ->
142→                            val mappableBinding = MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
143→                            if (bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(mappableBinding)) {
144→                                showDialogToReplaceBinding(mappableBinding, context.getString(R.string.binding_replace_key), it)
145→                            } else {
146→                                addBinding(mappableBinding)
147→                                dismiss()
148→                            }
149→                        }
150→                    }
151→                    negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel) { dismiss() }
152→
153→                    keyPicker.setKeycodeValidation(KeySelectionDialogUtils.disallowModifierKeyCodes())
154→                    noAutoDismiss()
155→                }
156→            }
157→            else -> {
158→                val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
159→                bindings.removeAt(index)
160→                value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
161→            }
162→        }
163→        // don't persist the value
164→        return false
165→    }
166→
167→    /**
168→     * Return if another command uses
169→     */
170→    private fun bindingIsUsedOnAnotherCommand(binding: MappableBinding): Boolean {
171→        return getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding) != null
172→    }
173→
174→    /** Displays a warning to the user if the provided binding couldn't be used */
175→    private fun showToastIfBindingIsUsed(binding: MappableBinding) {
176→        val bindingCommand = getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)
177→            ?: return
178→
179→        val commandName = context.getString(bindingCommand.resourceId)
180→        val text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName)
181→        UIUtils.showThemedToast(context, text, true)
182→    }
183→
184→    /** @return command where the binding is mapped excluding the current command */
185→    private fun getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding: MappableBinding): ViewerCommand? {
186→        return MappableBinding.allMappings(context.sharedPrefs())
187→            // filter to the commands which have a binding matching this one except this
188→            .firstOrNull { x -> x.second.any { cmdBinding -> cmdBinding == binding } && x.first.preferenceKey != key }?.first
189→    }
190→
191→    private fun addBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
192→        val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(value)
193→        // by removing the binding, we ensure it's now at the start of the list
194→        bindings.remove(binding)
195→        bindings.add(0, binding)
196→        value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
197→    }
198→
199→    /**
200→     * Remove binding from all control preferences
201→     * in the parent PreferenceGroup of this [ControlPreference]
202→     */
203→    private fun clearBinding(binding: MappableBinding) {
204→        val preferenceGroup = parent
205→            ?: return
206→
207→        for (command in ViewerCommand.values()) {
208→            val commandPreference = preferenceGroup.findPreference<ControlPreference>(command.preferenceKey)!!
209→            val bindings = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(commandPreference.value)
210→            if (binding in bindings) {
211→                bindings.remove(binding)
212→                commandPreference.value = bindings.toPreferenceString()
213→            }
214→        }
215→    }
216→
217→    private fun showDialogToReplaceBinding(binding: MappableBinding, title: String, parentDialog: MaterialDialog) {
218→        val commandName = context.getString(getCommandWithBindingExceptThis(binding)!!.resourceId)
219→
220→        AlertDialog.Builder(context).show {
221→            title(text = title)
222→            message(text = context.getString(R.string.bindings_already_bound, commandName))
223→            positiveButton(R.string.dialog_positive_replace) {
224→                clearBinding(binding)
225→                addBinding(binding)
226→                parentDialog.dismiss()
227→            }
228→            negativeButton(R.string.dialog_cancel)
229→        }
230→    }
231→
232→    companion object {
233→        private const val ADD_KEY_INDEX = -2
234→        private const val ADD_GESTURE_INDEX = -1
235→    }
236→}
237→

### 1. Added `RESCHEDULE` to `ViewerCommand` enum
**File:** `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommand.kt`
- Added `RESCHEDULE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card)` to the enum

### 2. Fixed the preference key
**File:** `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/values/preferences.xml`
- Changed `binding_RESCHEDULE_NOTE` to `binding_RESCHEDULE` to match the command name

### 3. Fixed the icon reference
**File:** `AnkiDroid/src/main/res/xml/preferences_controls.xml`  
- Changed `@drawable/ic_reschedule` to `@drawable/ic_card_reschedule_white` (the actual existing icon)

### 4. Added command handling in Reviewer
**File:** `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/Reviewer.kt`
- Added handling for `ViewerCommand.RESCHEDULE` in the `executeCommand` method that calls `showRescheduleCardDialog()`

### 5. Updated test file
**File:** `AnkiDroid/src/test/java/com/ichi2/anki/cardviewer/ViewerCommandTest.kt`
- Added `binding_RESCHEDULE` to the expected preference keys list

### 6. Updated analytics tracking
**File:** `AnkiDroid/src/main/java/com/ichi2/anki/analytics/UsageAnalytics.kt`
- Added `binding_RESCHEDULE` to the list of tracked preferences

## How to Use

Now you can:
1. Go to **Settings → Controls** 
2. Find the "Reschedule" option in the **Card** section
3. Assign a **gesture** or **controller button** to it
4. During reviews, use that gesture/button to directly open the "Reschedule for review in x days" dialog

This allows you to reschedule a card with a single gesture or button press, just like you can do with "Bury card", "Undo", etc.

conversationHistory.content:
Remove `Answer recommended (green)` and `Answer better than recomended` commands
I asked myself what those did, so I peeked at the code to discover that they are the exact same thing of calling `Answer button 3` and `Answer button 4`, respectively. So they are actually useless.

For reference, AnkiMobile doesn't have those options and instead of `Answer button [x]`, it is phrased as `Answer [again/easy/good/hard]` which IMO is clearer

---
so the task here is:
1. Remove the `Answer recommended (green)` and `Answer better than recomended` commands
2. Move their default commands to `Answer button 3` and `Answer button 4` respectively
3. Upgrade their preference assigned commands to `Answer button 3` and `Answer button 4` respectively

 20→import androidx.core.content.edit
 21→import com.ichi2.anki.R
 22→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.keyCode
 23→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.unicode
 24→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.ctrl
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.ModifierKeys.Companion.shift
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide

 29→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.fromPreference
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding.Companion.toPreferenceString
 31→import java.util.*
 32→import java.util.function.BiFunction
 33→import java.util.stream.Collectors
 34→
 35→/** Abstraction: Discuss moving many of these to 'Reviewer'  */
 36→enum class ViewerCommand(val resourceId: Int) {
 37→    SHOW_ANSWER(R.string.show_answer),
 38→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1(R.string.gesture_answer_1),
 39→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2(R.string.gesture_answer_2),
 40→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3(R.string.gesture_answer_3),
 41→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4(R.string.gesture_answer_4),
 42→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_RECOMMENDED(R.string.gesture_answer_green),
 43→    FLIP_OR_ANSWER_BETTER_THAN_RECOMMENDED(R.string.gesture_answer_better_recommended),
 44→    UNDO(R.string.undo),
 45→    EDIT(R.string.cardeditor_title_edit_card),
 46→    MARK(R.string.menu_mark_note),
 47→    BURY_CARD(R.string.menu_bury_card),
 48→    SUSPEND_CARD(R.string.menu_suspend_card),
 49→    DELETE(R.string.menu_delete_note),
 50→    PLAY_MEDIA(R.string.gesture_play),
 51→    EXIT(R.string.gesture_abort_learning),
 52→    BURY_NOTE(R.string.menu_bury_note),
 53→    SUSPEND_NOTE(R.string.menu_suspend_note),
 54→    TOGGLE_FLAG_RED(R.string.gesture_flag_red),
 55→    TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE(R.string.gesture_flag_orange),
 56→    TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN(R.string.gesture_flag_green),
 57→    TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE(R.string.gesture_flag_blue),
 58→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK(R.string.gesture_flag_pink),
 59→    TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE(R.string.gesture_flag_turquoise),
 60→    TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE(R.string.gesture_flag_purple),
 61→    UNSET_FLAG(R.string.gesture_flag_remove),
 62→    PAGE_UP(R.string.gesture_page_up),
 63→    PAGE_DOWN(R.string.gesture_page_down),
 64→    TAG(R.string.add_tag),
 65→    CARD_INFO(R.string.card_info_title),
 66→    ABORT_AND_SYNC(R.string.gesture_abort_sync),
 67→    RECORD_VOICE(R.string.record_voice),
 68→    REPLAY_VOICE(R.string.replay_voice),
 69→    TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD(R.string.gesture_toggle_whiteboard),
 70→    CLEAR_WHITEBOARD(R.string.clear_whiteboard),
 71→    CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR(R.string.title_whiteboard_editor),
 72→    SHOW_HINT(R.string.gesture_show_hint),
 73→    SHOW_ALL_HINTS(R.string.gesture_show_all_hints),
 74→    ADD_NOTE(R.string.menu_add_note),
 75→    RESCHEDULE_NOTE(R.string.card_editor_reschedule_card);
 76→
 77→    companion object {
 78→        val allDefaultBindings: List<MappableBinding>
 79→            get() = Arrays.stream(values())
 80→                .flatMap { x: ViewerCommand -> x.defaultValue.stream() }
 81→                .collect(Collectors.toList())
 82→    }
 83→
 84→    val preferenceKey: String
 85→        get() = "binding_$name"
 86→
 87→    fun addBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 88→        val addAtStart = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 89→            // reorder the elements, moving the added binding to the first position
 90→            collection.remove(element)
 91→            collection.add(0, element)
 92→            true
 93→        }
 94→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtStart)
 95→    }
 96→
 97→    fun addBindingAtEnd(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
 98→        val addAtEnd = BiFunction { collection: MutableList<MappableBinding>, element: MappableBinding ->
 99→            // do not reorder the elements
100→            if (collection.contains(element)) {
101→                return@BiFunction false
102→            }
103→            collection.add(element)
104→            return@BiFunction true
105→        }
106→        addBindingInternal(preferences, binding, addAtEnd)
107→    }
108→
109→    private fun addBindingInternal(preferences: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding, performAdd: BiFunction<MutableList<MappableBinding>, MappableBinding, Boolean>) {
110→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = fromPreference(preferences, this)
111→        performAdd.apply(bindings, binding)
112→        val newValue: String = bindings.toPreferenceString()
113→        preferences.edit { putString(preferenceKey, newValue) }
114→    }
115→
116→    fun removeBinding(prefs: SharedPreferences, binding: MappableBinding) {
117→        val bindings: MutableList<MappableBinding> = MappableBinding.fromPreferenceString(preferenceKey)
118→        bindings.remove(binding)
119→        prefs.edit {
120→            putString(preferenceKey, bindings.toPreferenceString())
121→        }
122→    }
123→
124→    // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
125→    val defaultValue: List<MappableBinding>
126→        get() = // If we use the serialised format, then this adds additional coupling to the properties.
127→            when (this) {
128→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1 -> from(
129→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_Y, CardSide.BOTH),
130→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.ANSWER),
131→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.ANSWER)
132→                )
133→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2 -> from(
134→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_X, CardSide.BOTH),
135→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.ANSWER),
136→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.ANSWER)
137→                )
138→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3 -> from(
139→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_B, CardSide.BOTH),
140→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.ANSWER),
141→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.ANSWER)
142→                )
143→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4 -> from(
144→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_BUTTON_A, CardSide.BOTH),
145→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.ANSWER),
146→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.ANSWER)
147→                )
148→                FLIP_OR_ANSWER_RECOMMENDED -> from(
149→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_DPAD_CENTER, CardSide.BOTH),
150→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_SPACE, CardSide.ANSWER),
151→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER),
152→                    keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_ENTER, CardSide.ANSWER)
153→                )
154→                EDIT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_E, CardSide.BOTH))
155→                MARK -> from(unicode('*', CardSide.BOTH))
156→                BURY_CARD -> from(unicode('-', CardSide.BOTH))
157→                BURY_NOTE -> from(unicode('=', CardSide.BOTH))
158→                SUSPEND_CARD -> from(unicode('@', CardSide.BOTH))
159→                SUSPEND_NOTE -> from(unicode('!', CardSide.BOTH))
160→                PLAY_MEDIA -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_R, CardSide.BOTH), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_F5, CardSide.BOTH))
161→                REPLAY_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH))
162→                RECORD_VOICE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_V, CardSide.BOTH, shift()))
163→                UNDO -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_Z, CardSide.BOTH))
164→                TOGGLE_FLAG_RED -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_1, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
165→                TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_2, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
166→                TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_3, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
167→                TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_4, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
168→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_5, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
169→                TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_6, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
170→                TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()), keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_NUMPAD_7, CardSide.BOTH, ctrl()))
171→                SHOW_HINT -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_H, CardSide.BOTH))
172→                SHOW_ALL_HINTS -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_G, CardSide.BOTH))
173→                ADD_NOTE -> from(keyCode(KeyEvent.KEYCODE_A, CardSide.BOTH))
174→                else -> ArrayList()
175→            }
176→
177→    private fun keyCode(keycode: Int, side: CardSide, keys: ModifierKeys): MappableBinding {
178→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keys, keycode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
179→    }
180→
181→    private fun unicode(c: Char, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
182→        return MappableBinding(unicode(c), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
183→    }
184→
185→    private fun from(vararg bindings: MappableBinding): List<MappableBinding> {
186→        return ArrayList(listOf(*bindings))
187→    }
188→
189→    private fun keyCode(keyCode: Int, side: CardSide): MappableBinding {
190→        return MappableBinding(keyCode(keyCode), MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(side))
191→    }
192→
193→    fun interface CommandProcessor {
194→        /**
195→         *
196→         * example failure: answering an ease on the front of the card
197→         */
198→        fun executeCommand(which: ViewerCommand, fromGesture: Gesture?): Boolean
199→    }
200→}

 16→package com.ichi2.anki.servicelayer
 17→
 18→import android.content.Context
 19→import android.content.SharedPreferences
 20→import android.view.KeyEvent
 21→import androidx.annotation.VisibleForTesting
 22→import androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatDelegate
 23→import androidx.core.content.edit
 24→import androidx.core.os.LocaleListCompat
 25→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.Gesture
 26→import com.ichi2.anki.cardviewer.ViewerCommand
 27→import com.ichi2.anki.noteeditor.CustomToolbarButton
 28→import com.ichi2.anki.preferences.sharedPrefs
 29→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding
 30→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.Binding.Companion.keyCode
 31→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.CardSide
 32→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.FullScreenMode
 33→import com.ichi2.anki.reviewer.MappableBinding
 34→import com.ichi2.libanki.Consts
 35→import com.ichi2.utils.HashUtil.HashSetInit
 36→import timber.log.Timber
 37→import java.util.*
 38→import kotlin.collections.ArrayList
 39→
 40→private typealias VersionIdentifier = Int
 41→private typealias LegacyVersionIdentifier = Long
 42→
 43→object PreferenceUpgradeService {
 44→    fun upgradePreferences(context: Context, previousVersionCode: LegacyVersionIdentifier): Boolean =
 45→        upgradePreferences(context.sharedPrefs(), previousVersionCode)
 46→
 47→    /** @return Whether any preferences were upgraded */
 48→    internal fun upgradePreferences(preferences: SharedPreferences, previousVersionCode: LegacyVersionIdentifier): Boolean {
 49→        val pendingPreferenceUpgrades = PreferenceUpgrade.getPendingUpgrades(preferences, previousVersionCode)
 50→
 51→        pendingPreferenceUpgrades.forEach {
 52→            it.performUpgrade(preferences)
 53→        }
 54→
 55→        return pendingPreferenceUpgrades.isNotEmpty()
 56→    }
 57→
 58→    /**
 59→     * Specifies that no preference upgrades need to happen.
 60→     * Typically because the app has been run for the first time, or the preferences
 61→     * have been deleted
 62→     */
 63→    @JvmStatic // reqired for mockito for now
 64→    fun setPreferencesUpToDate(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
 65→        Timber.i("Marking preferences as up to date")
 66→        PreferenceUpgrade.setPreferenceToLatestVersion(preferences)
 67→    }
 68→
 69→    abstract class PreferenceUpgrade private constructor(val versionIdentifier: VersionIdentifier) {
 70→        /*
 71→        To add a new preference upgrade:
 72→          * yield a new class from getAllInstances (do not use `legacyPreviousVersionCode` in the constructor)
 73→          * Implement the upgrade() method
 74→          * Set mVersionIdentifier to 1 more than the previous versionIdentifier
 75→          * Run tests in PreferenceUpgradeServiceTest
 76→         */
 77→
 78→        companion object {
 79→            /** A version code where the value doesn't matter as we're not using the result */
 80→            private const val IGNORED_LEGACY_VERSION_CODE = 0L
 81→            const val upgradeVersionPrefKey = "preferenceUpgradeVersion"
 82→
 83→            /** Returns all instances of preference upgrade classes */
 84→            internal fun getAllInstances(legacyPreviousVersionCode: LegacyVersionIdentifier) = sequence<PreferenceUpgrade> {
 85→                yield(LegacyPreferenceUpgrade(legacyPreviousVersionCode))
 86→                yield(UpdateNoteEditorToolbarPrefs())
 87→                yield(UpgradeGesturesToControls())
 88→                yield(UpgradeDayAndNightThemes())
 89→                yield(UpgradeFetchMedia())
 90→                yield(UpgradeAppLocale())
 91→                yield(RemoveScrollingButtons())
 92→            }
 93→
 94→            /** Returns a list of preference upgrade classes which have not been applied */
 95→            fun getPendingUpgrades(preferences: SharedPreferences, legacyPreviousVersionCode: LegacyVersionIdentifier): List<PreferenceUpgrade> {
 96→                val currentPrefVersion: VersionIdentifier = getPreferenceVersion(preferences)
 97→
 98→                return getAllInstances(legacyPreviousVersionCode).filter {
 99→                    it.versionIdentifier > currentPrefVersion
100→                }.toList()
101→            }
102→
103→            /** Sets the preference version such that no upgrades need to be applied */
104→            fun setPreferenceToLatestVersion(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
105→                val versionWhichRequiresNoUpgrades = getLatestVersion()
106→                setPreferenceVersion(preferences, versionWhichRequiresNoUpgrades)
107→            }
108→
109→            internal fun getPreferenceVersion(preferences: SharedPreferences) =
110→                preferences.getInt(upgradeVersionPrefKey, 0)
111→
112→            internal fun setPreferenceVersion(preferences: SharedPreferences, versionIdentifier: VersionIdentifier) {
113→                Timber.i("upgrading preference version to '$versionIdentifier'")
114→                preferences.edit { putInt(upgradeVersionPrefKey, versionIdentifier) }
115→            }
116→
117→            /** Returns the collection of all preference version numbers */
118→            @VisibleForTesting
119→            fun getAllVersionIdentifiers(): Sequence<VersionIdentifier> =
120→                getAllInstances(IGNORED_LEGACY_VERSION_CODE).map { it.versionIdentifier }
121→
122→            /**
123→             * @return the latest "version" of the preferences
124→             * If the preferences are set to this version, then no upgrades will take place
125→             */
126→            private fun getLatestVersion(): VersionIdentifier = getAllVersionIdentifiers().maxOrNull() ?: 0
127→        }
128→
129→        /** Handles preference upgrades before 2021-08-01,
130→         * upgrades were detected via a version code comparison
131→         * rather than comparing a preference value
132→         */
133→        private class LegacyPreferenceUpgrade(val previousVersionCode: LegacyVersionIdentifier) : PreferenceUpgrade(1) {
134→            override fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
135→                if (!needsLegacyPreferenceUpgrade(previousVersionCode)) {
136→                    return
137→                }
138→
139→                Timber.i("running upgradePreferences()")
140→                // clear all prefs if super old version to prevent any errors
141→                if (previousVersionCode < 20300130) {
142→                    Timber.i("Old version of Anki - Clearing preferences")
143→                    preferences.edit { clear() }
144→                }
145→                // when upgrading from before 2.5alpha35
146→                if (previousVersionCode < 20500135) {
147→                    Timber.i("Old version of Anki - Fixing Zoom")
148→                    // Card zooming behaviour was changed the preferences renamed
149→                    val oldCardZoom = preferences.getInt("relativeDisplayFontSize", 100)
150→                    val oldImageZoom = preferences.getInt("relativeImageSize", 100)
151→                    preferences.edit {
152→                        putInt("cardZoom", oldCardZoom)
153→                        putInt("imageZoom", oldImageZoom)
154→                    }
155→                    if (!preferences.getBoolean("useBackup", true)) {
156→                        preferences.edit { putInt("backupMax", 0) }
157→                    }
158→                    preferences.edit {
159→                        remove("useBackup")
160→                        remove("intentAdditionInstantAdd")
161→                    }
162→                }
163→                FullScreenMode.upgradeFromLegacyPreference(preferences)
164→            }
165→
166→            fun needsLegacyPreferenceUpgrade(previous: Long): Boolean = previous < CHECK_PREFERENCES_AT_VERSION
167→
168→            companion object {
169→                /**
170→                 * The latest package version number that included changes to the preferences that requires handling. All
171→                 * collections being upgraded to (or after) this version must update preferences.
172→                 *
173→                 * #9309 Do not modify this variable - it no longer works.
174→                 *
175→                 * Instead, add an unconditional check for the old preference before the call to
176→                 * "needsPreferenceUpgrade", and perform the upgrade.
177→                 */
178→                const val CHECK_PREFERENCES_AT_VERSION = 20500225
179→            }
180→        }
181→
182→        fun performUpgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
183→            Timber.i("Running preference upgrade: ${this.javaClass.simpleName}")
184→            upgrade(preferences)
185→
186→            setPreferenceVersion(preferences, this.versionIdentifier)
187→        }
188→
189→        protected abstract fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences)
190→
191→        /**
192→         * update toolbar buttons with new preferences, when button text empty or null then it adds the index as button text
193→         */
194→        internal class UpdateNoteEditorToolbarPrefs : PreferenceUpgrade(4) {
195→            override fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
196→                val buttons = getNewToolbarButtons(preferences)
197→
198→                // update prefs
199→                preferences.edit {
200→                    remove("note_editor_custom_buttons")
201→                    putStringSet("note_editor_custom_buttons", CustomToolbarButton.toStringSet(buttons))
202→                }
203→            }
204→
205→            private fun getNewToolbarButtons(preferences: SharedPreferences): ArrayList<CustomToolbarButton> {
206→                // get old toolbar prefs
207→                val set = preferences.getStringSet("note_editor_custom_buttons", HashSetInit<String>(0)) as Set<String?>
208→                // new list with buttons size
209→                val buttons = ArrayList<CustomToolbarButton>(set.size)
210→
211→                // parse fields with separator
212→                for (s in set) {
213→                    val fields = s!!.split(Consts.FIELD_SEPARATOR.toRegex(), CustomToolbarButton.KEEP_EMPTY_ENTRIES.coerceAtLeast(0)).toTypedArray()
214→                    if (fields.size != 3) {
215→                        continue
216→                    }
217→
218→                    val index: Int = try {
219→                        fields[0].toInt()
220→                    } catch (e: Exception) {
221→                        Timber.w(e)
222→                        continue
223→                    }
224→
225→                    // add new button with the index + 1 as button text
226→                    val visualIndex: Int = index + 1
227→                    val buttonText = visualIndex.toString()
228→
229→                    // fields 1 is prefix, fields 2 is suffix
230→                    buttons.add(CustomToolbarButton(index, buttonText, fields[1], fields[2]))
231→                }
232→                return buttons
233→            }
234→        }
235→
236→        internal class UpgradeGesturesToControls : PreferenceUpgrade(5) {
237→            val oldCommandValues = mapOf(
238→                Pair(1, ViewerCommand.SHOW_ANSWER),
239→                Pair(2, ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE1),
240→                Pair(3, ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE2),
241→                Pair(4, ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE3),
242→                Pair(5, ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_EASE4),
243→                Pair(6, ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_RECOMMENDED),
244→                Pair(7, ViewerCommand.FLIP_OR_ANSWER_BETTER_THAN_RECOMMENDED),
245→                Pair(8, ViewerCommand.UNDO),
246→                Pair(9, ViewerCommand.EDIT),
247→                Pair(10, ViewerCommand.MARK),
248→                Pair(12, ViewerCommand.BURY_CARD),
249→                Pair(13, ViewerCommand.SUSPEND_CARD),
250→                Pair(14, ViewerCommand.DELETE),
251→                Pair(16, ViewerCommand.PLAY_MEDIA),
252→                Pair(17, ViewerCommand.EXIT),
253→                Pair(18, ViewerCommand.BURY_NOTE),
254→                Pair(19, ViewerCommand.SUSPEND_NOTE),
255→                Pair(20, ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_RED),
256→                Pair(21, ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_ORANGE),
257→                Pair(22, ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_GREEN),
258→                Pair(23, ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_BLUE),
259→                Pair(38, ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PINK),
260→                Pair(39, ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_TURQUOISE),
261→                Pair(40, ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_FLAG_PURPLE),
262→                Pair(24, ViewerCommand.UNSET_FLAG),
263→                Pair(30, ViewerCommand.PAGE_UP),
264→                Pair(31, ViewerCommand.PAGE_DOWN),
265→                Pair(32, ViewerCommand.TAG),
266→                Pair(33, ViewerCommand.CARD_INFO),
267→                Pair(34, ViewerCommand.ABORT_AND_SYNC),
268→                Pair(35, ViewerCommand.RECORD_VOICE),
269→                Pair(36, ViewerCommand.REPLAY_VOICE),
270→                Pair(37, ViewerCommand.TOGGLE_WHITEBOARD),
271→                Pair(44, ViewerCommand.CLEAR_WHITEBOARD),
272→                Pair(45, ViewerCommand.CHANGE_WHITEBOARD_PEN_COLOR),
273→                Pair(41, ViewerCommand.SHOW_HINT),
274→                Pair(42, ViewerCommand.SHOW_ALL_HINTS),
275→                Pair(43, ViewerCommand.ADD_NOTE)
276→            )
277→
278→            override fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
279→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureSwipeUp", Gesture.SWIPE_UP)
280→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureSwipeDown", Gesture.SWIPE_DOWN)
281→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureSwipeLeft", Gesture.SWIPE_LEFT)
282→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureSwipeRight", Gesture.SWIPE_RIGHT)
283→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureLongclick", Gesture.LONG_TAP)
284→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureDoubleTap", Gesture.DOUBLE_TAP)
285→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapTopLeft", Gesture.TAP_TOP_LEFT)
286→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapTop", Gesture.TAP_TOP)
287→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapTopRight", Gesture.TAP_TOP_RIGHT)
288→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapLeft", Gesture.TAP_LEFT)
289→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapCenter", Gesture.TAP_CENTER)
290→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapRight", Gesture.TAP_RIGHT)
291→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapBottomLeft", Gesture.TAP_BOTTOM_LEFT)
292→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapBottom", Gesture.TAP_BOTTOM)
293→                upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureTapBottomRight", Gesture.TAP_BOTTOM_RIGHT)
294→                upgradeVolumeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureVolumeUp", KeyEvent.KEYCODE_VOLUME_UP)
295→                upgradeVolumeGestureToBinding(preferences, "gestureVolumeDown", KeyEvent.KEYCODE_VOLUME_DOWN)
296→            }
297→
298→            private fun upgradeVolumeGestureToBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey: String, volumeKeyCode: Int) {
299→                upgradeBinding(preferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey, keyCode(volumeKeyCode))
300→            }
301→
302→            private fun upgradeGestureToBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey: String, gesture: Gesture) {
303→                upgradeBinding(preferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey, Binding.gesture(gesture))
304→            }
305→
306→            @VisibleForTesting
307→            internal fun upgradeBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey: String, binding: Binding) {
308→                Timber.d("Replacing gesture '%s' with binding", oldGesturePreferenceKey)
309→
310→                // This exists as a user may have mapped "volume down" to "UNDO".
311→                // Undo already exists as a key binding, and we don't want to trash this during an upgrade
312→                if (!preferences.contains(oldGesturePreferenceKey)) {
313→                    Timber.v("No preference to upgrade")
314→                    return
315→                }
316→
317→                try {
318→                    replaceBinding(preferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey, binding)
319→                } finally {
320→                    Timber.v("removing pref key: '%s'", oldGesturePreferenceKey)
321→                    // remove the old key
322→                    preferences.edit { remove(oldGesturePreferenceKey) }
323→                }
324→            }
325→
326→            private fun replaceBinding(preferences: SharedPreferences, oldGesturePreferenceKey: String, binding: Binding) {
327→                // the preference should be set, but if it's null, then we have nothing to do
328→                val pref = preferences.getString(oldGesturePreferenceKey, "0") ?: return
329→                // If the preference doesn't map (for example: it was removed), then nothing to do
330→                val asInt = pref.toIntOrNull() ?: return
331→                val command = oldCommandValues[asInt] ?: return
332→
333→                Timber.i("Moving preference from '%s' to '%s'", oldGesturePreferenceKey, command.preferenceKey)
334→
335→                // add to the binding_COMMANDNAME preference
336→                val mappableBinding = MappableBinding(binding, MappableBinding.Screen.Reviewer(CardSide.BOTH))
337→                command.addBindingAtEnd(preferences, mappableBinding)
338→            }
339→        }
340→        internal class UpgradeDayAndNightThemes : PreferenceUpgrade(6) {
341→            override fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
342→                val dayTheme = preferences.getString("dayTheme", "0")
343→                val nightTheme = preferences.getString("nightTheme", "0")
344→
345→                preferences.edit {
346→                    if (dayTheme == "1") { // plain
347→                        putString("dayTheme", "2")
348→                    } else { // light
349→                        putString("dayTheme", "1")
350→                    }
351→                    if (nightTheme == "1") { // dark
352→                        putString("nightTheme", "4")
353→                    } else { // black
354→                        putString("nightTheme", "3")
355→                    }
356→                    remove("invertedColors")
357→                }
358→            }
359→        }
360→
361→        internal class UpgradeFetchMedia : PreferenceUpgrade(9) {
362→            override fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
363→                val fetchMediaSwitch = preferences.getBoolean(RemovedPreferences.SYNC_FETCHES_MEDIA, true)
364→                val status = if (fetchMediaSwitch) "always" else "never"
365→                preferences.edit {
366→                    remove(RemovedPreferences.SYNC_FETCHES_MEDIA)
367→                    putString("syncFetchMedia", status)
368→                }
369→            }
370→        }
371→
372→        internal class UpgradeAppLocale : PreferenceUpgrade(10) {
373→            override fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
374→                fun getLocale(localeCode: String): Locale {
375→                    // Language separators are '_' or '-' at different times in display/resource fetch
376→                    val locale: Locale = if (localeCode.contains("_") || localeCode.contains("-")) {
377→                        try {
378→                            val localeParts = localeCode.split("[_-]".toRegex(), 2).toTypedArray()
379→                            Locale(localeParts[0], localeParts[1])
380→                        } catch (e: ArrayIndexOutOfBoundsException) {
381→                            Timber.w(e, "getLocale variant split fail, using code '%s' raw.", localeCode)
382→                            Locale(localeCode)
383→                        }
384→                    } else {
385→                        Locale(localeCode) // guaranteed to be non null
386→                    }
387→                    return locale
388→                }
389→                // 1. upgrade value from `locale.toString()` to `locale.toLanguageTag()`,
390→                // because the new API uses language tags
391→                val languagePrefValue = preferences.getString("language", "")!!
392→                val languageTag = if (languagePrefValue.isNotEmpty()) {
393→                    getLocale(languagePrefValue).toLanguageTag()
394→                } else {
395→                    null
396→                }
397→                preferences.edit {
398→                    putString("language", languageTag ?: "")
399→                }
400→                // 2. Set the locale with the new AndroidX API
401→                val localeList = LocaleListCompat.forLanguageTags(languageTag)
402→                AppCompatDelegate.setApplicationLocales(localeList)
403→            }
404→        }
405→
406→        internal class RemoveScrollingButtons : PreferenceUpgrade(11) {
407→            override fun upgrade(preferences: SharedPreferences) {
408→                preferences.edit { remove("scrolling_buttons") }
409→            }
410→        }
411→    }
412→}
413→
414→object RemovedPreferences {
415→    const val SYNC_FETCHES_MEDIA = "syncFetchesMedia"
416→}
417→
